*Diff for `LoginPage.tsx`:*
```diff
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { authApi } from '../services/api';
import { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore';
import { User } from '../types';

export const LoginPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [identifier, setIdentifier] = useState('');
  const [password, setPassword] = useState('');
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const { login } = useAuthStore();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');
    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const response = await authApi.login(identifier, password);

      if (response.error) {
        setError(response.error);
        return;
      }

      const { token, user } = response.data as { token: string; user: User };
      login(token, user);

      // Redirect based on profile completion
      if (!user.profileComplete) {
        navigate('/profile-setup');
      } else if (user.role === 'ADMIN') {
        navigate('/admin');
      } else {
        navigate('/dashboard');
      }
    } catch {
      setError('Network error. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 via-primary-50 to-accent-50 px-4">
      <div className="card w-full max-w-md animate-slide-up">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <span className="text-5xl">📝</span>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4">PoemQuizzer</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">Sign in to continue</p>
        </div>

        {/* Error */}
        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Form */}
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="identifier" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Email or Username
            </label>
            <input
              id="identifier"
              type="text"
              className="input"
              value={identifier}
              onChange={(e) => setIdentifier(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Enter your email or username"
              required
              autoComplete="username"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              id="password"
              type="password"
              className="input"
              value={password}
              onChange={(e) => setPassword(e.target.value)}
              placeholder="Enter your password"
              required
              autoComplete="current-password"
            />
          </div>

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="btn btn-primary w-full py-3 text-lg"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                <svg className="animate-spin h-5 w-5" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
                  <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
                </svg>
                Signing in...
              </span>
            ) : (
              'Sign In'
            )}
          </button>
        </form>

        {/* Footer */}
        <p className="text-center text-sm text-gray-600 mt-6">
          Don't have an account?{' '}
          <Link to="/register" className="text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium">
            Register here
          </Link>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

  "content": "import React, { useState } from 'react';\nimport { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { authApi } from '../services/api';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore';\nimport { User } from '../types';\n\nexport const RegisterPage: React.FC = () => {\n  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({\n    email: '',\n    username: '',\n    password: '',\n    confirmPassword: '',\n  });\n  const [error, setError] = useState('');\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n\n  const { login } = useAuthStore();\n  const navigate = useNavigate();\n\n  const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {\n    setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }));\n  };\n\n  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {\n    e.preventDefault();\n    setError('');\n\n    // Validation\n    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {\n      setError('Passwords do not match');\n      return;\n    }\n\n    if (formData.password.length < 8) {\n      setError('Password must be at least 8 characters');\n      return;\n    }\n\n    setIsLoading(true);\n\n    try {\n      const response = await authApi.register(\n        formData.email,\n        formData.username,\n        formData.password\n      );\n\n      if (response.error) {\n        setError(response.error);\n        return;\n      }\n\n      const { token, user } = response.data as { token: string; user: User };\n      login(token, user);\n      navigate('/profile-setup');\n    } catch {\n      setError('Network error. Please try again.');\n    } finally {\n      setIsLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 via-primary-50 to-accent-50 px-4\">\n      <div className=\"card w-full max-w-md animate-slide-up\">\n        {/* Header */}\n        <div className=\"text-center mb-8\">\n          <span className=\"text-5xl\">📝</span>\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4\">Create Account</h1>\n          <p className=\"text-gray-600 mt-2\">Join the quiz competition</p>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Error */}\n        {error && (\n          <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 rounded-lg text-sm\">\n            {error}\n          </div>\n        )}\n\n        {/* Form */}\n        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className=\"space-y-4\">\n          <div>\n            <label htmlFor=\"email\" className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\">\n              Email Address\n            </label>\n            <input\n              id=\"email\"\n              name=\"email\"\n              type=\"email\"\n              className=\"input\"\n              value={formData.email}\n              onChange={handleChange}\n              placeholder=\"you@university.edu\"\n              required\n              autoComplete=\"email\"\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label htmlFor=\"username\" className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\">\n              Username\n            </label>\n            <input\n              id=\"username\"\n              name=\"username\"\n              type=\"text\"\n              className=\"input\"\n              value={formData.username}\n              onChange={handleChange}\n              placeholder=\"Choose a username\"\n              required\n              autoComplete=\"username\"\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label htmlFor=\"password\" className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\">\n              Password\n            </label>\n            <input\n              id=\"password\"\n              name=\"password\"\n              type=\"password\"\n              className=\"input\"\n              value={formData.password}\n              onChange={handleChange}\n              placeholder=\"Min. 8 characters\"\n              required\n              autoComplete=\"new-password\"\n            />\n          </div>\n\n          <div>\n            <label htmlFor=\"confirmPassword\" className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\">\n              Confirm Password\n            </label>\n            <input\n              id=\"confirmPassword\"\n              name=\"confirmPassword\"\n              type=\"password\"\n              className=\"input\"\n              value={formData.confirmPassword}\n *Diff for `RegisterPage.tsx`:*
```diff
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Link, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { authApi } from '../services/api';
import { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore';
import { User } from '../types';

export const RegisterPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    email: '',
    username: '',
    password: '',
    confirmPassword: '',
  });
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const { login } = useAuthStore();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement>) => {
    setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }));
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');

    // Validation
    if (formData.password !== formData.confirmPassword) {
      setError('Passwords do not match');
      return;
    }

    if (formData.password.length < 8) {
      setError('Password must be at least 8 characters');
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const response = await authApi.register(
        formData.email,
        formData.username,
        formData.password
      );

      if (response.error) {
        setError(response.error);
        return;
      }

      const { token, user } = response.data as { token: string; user: User };
      login(token, user);
      navigate('/profile-setup');
    } catch {
      setError('Network error. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 via-primary-50 to-accent-50 px-4">
      <div className="card w-full max-w-md animate-slide-up">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <span className="text-5xl">📝</span>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4">Create Account</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">Join the quiz competition</p>
        </div>

        {/* Error */}
        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Form */}
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="email" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Email Address
            </label>
            <input
              id="email"
              name="email"
              type="email"
              className="input"
              value={formData.email}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="you@university.edu"
              required
              autoComplete="email"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="username" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Username
            </label>
            <input
              id="username"
              name="username"
              type="text"
              className="input"
              value={formData.username}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="Choose a username"
              required
              autoComplete="username"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="password" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Password
            </label>
            <input
              id="password"
              name="password"
              type="password"
              className="input"
              value={formData.password}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="Min. 8 characters"
              required
              autoComplete="new-password"
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="confirmPassword" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Confirm Password
            </label>
            <input
              id="confirmPassword"
              name="confirmPassword"
              type="password"
              className="input"
              value={formData.confirmPassword}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="Repeat your password"
              required
              autoComplete="new-password"
            />
          </div>

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="btn btn-primary w-full py-3 text-lg"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                <svg className="animate-spin h-5 w-5" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
                  <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
                </svg>
                Creating account...
              </span>
            ) : (
              'Create Account'
            )}
          </button>
        </form>

        {/* Footer */}
        <p className="text-center text-sm text-gray-600 mt-6">
          Already have an account?{' '}
          <Link to="/login" className="text-primary-600 hover:text-primary-700 font-medium">
            Sign in here
          </Link>
        </p>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

```

```diff
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { authApi } from '../services/api';
import { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore';
import { User } from '../types';

export const ProfileSetupPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [formData, setFormData] = useState({
    fullName: '',
    faculty: '',
    department: '',
    studentId: '',
  });
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);

  const { updateUser } = useAuthStore();
  const navigate = useNavigate();

  const handleChange = (e: React.ChangeEvent<HTMLInputElement | HTMLSelectElement>) => {
    setFormData((prev) => ({ ...prev, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }));
  };

  const handleSubmit = async (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    setError('');

    if (!formData.fullName.trim() || !formData.faculty.trim() ||
        !formData.department.trim() || !formData.studentId.trim()) {
      setError('All fields are required');
      return;
    }

    setIsLoading(true);

    try {
      const response = await authApi.setupProfile(
        formData.fullName,
        formData.faculty,
        formData.department,
        formData.studentId
      );

      if (response.error) {
        setError(response.error);
        return;
      }

      const { user } = response.data as { user: User };
      updateUser(user);
      navigate('/dashboard');
    } catch {
      setError('Network error. Please try again.');
    } finally {
      setIsLoading(false);
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-50 via-primary-50 to-accent-50 px-4">
      <div className="card w-full max-w-md animate-slide-up">
        {/* Header */}
        <div className="text-center mb-8">
          <span className="text-5xl">👤</span>
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4">Complete Your Profile</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">This information cannot be changed later</p>
        </div>

        {/* Warning */}
        <div className="mb-6 p-3 bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 text-amber-800 rounded-lg text-sm">
          ⚠️ Please double-check your information. <strong>These fields cannot be edited after submission.</strong>
        </div>

        {/* Error */}
        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Form */}
        <form onSubmit={handleSubmit} className="space-y-4">
          <div>
            <label htmlFor="fullName" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Full Name
            </label>
            <input
              id="fullName"
              name="fullName"
              type="text"
              className="input"
              value={formData.fullName}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="John Doe"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="faculty" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Faculty
            </label>
            <input
              id="faculty"
              name="faculty"
              type="text"
              className="input"
              value={formData.faculty}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="e.g., Engineering, Arts, Science"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="department" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Department
            </label>
            <input
              id="department"
              name="department"
              type="text"
              className="input"
              value={formData.department}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="e.g., Computer Science, English"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <div>
            <label htmlFor="studentId" className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">
              Student ID
            </label>
            <input
              id="studentId"
              name="studentId"
              type="text"
              className="input"
              value={formData.studentId}
              onChange={handleChange}
              placeholder="e.g., 2024-CS-001"
              required
            />
          </div>

          <button
            type="submit"
            disabled={isLoading}
            className="btn btn-primary w-full py-3 text-lg"
          >
            {isLoading ? (
              <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                <svg className="animate-spin h-5 w-5" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
                  <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
                </svg>
                Saving...
              </span>
            ) : (
              'Complete Setup'
            )}
          </button>
        </form>
      </div>
    </div>
  );
};

{
  "content": "import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { Link } from 'react-router-dom';\nimport { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore';\nimport { quizApi } from '../services/api';\nimport { Score, EventPhase } from '../types';\nimport { Layout } from '../components/Layout';\n\nexport const DashboardPage: React.FC = () => {\n  const { user } = useAuthStore();\n  const [scores, setScores] = useState<Record<EventPhase, Score | null>>({\n    PRE_QUALIFIER: null,\n    FINALS: null,\n  });\n  const [phaseStatus, setPhaseStatus] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    async function fetchData() {\n      try {\n        const [preScore, finalScore, statusRes] = await Promise.all([\n          quizApi.getScore('PRE_QUALIFIER'),\n          quizApi.getScore('FINALS'),\n          quizApi.getStatus(),\n        ]);\n\n        if (preScore.data) setScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, PRE_QUALIFIER: preScore.data.score }));\n        if (finalScore.data) setScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, FINALS: finalScore.data.score }));\n        if (statusRes.data) setPhaseStatus(statusRes.data);\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error('Dashboard fetch error:', err);\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }\n\n    fetchData();\n  }, []);\n\n  const preQualifierActive = (phaseStatus as { phases?: { preQualifier?: { active?: boolean } } })?.phases?.preQualifier?.active ?? false;\n  const finalsActive = (phaseStatus as { phases?: { finals?: { active?: boolean } } })?.phases?.finals?.active ?? false;\n\n  const getPreQualifierStatus = () => {\n    if (!preQualifierActive) return { label: 'Closed', color: 'bg-gray-400', disabled: true };\n    const score = scores.PRE_QUALIFIER;\n    if (score && score.totalQuestions > 0) return { label: 'In Progress', color: 'bg-warning', disabled: false };\n    return { label: 'Available', color: 'bg-success', disabled: false };\n  };\n\n  const getFinalsStatus = () => {\n    if (!finalsActive) {\n      const finalsData = (phaseStatus as { phases?: { finals?: { startDate?: string } } })?.phases?.finals;\n      return { label: 'Not Started', color: 'bg-gray-400', disabled: true, info: finalsData?.startDate };\n    }\n    return { label: 'LIVE', color: 'bg-danger', disabled: false };\n  };\n\n  const preStatus = getPreQualifierStatus();\n  const finalStatus = getFinalsStatus();\n\n  return (\n    <Layout>\n      <div className=\"max-w-4xl mx-auto\">\n        {/* Welcome */}\n        <div className=\"card mb-8 animate-slide-up\">\n          <h1 className=\"text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900\">\n            Welcome, {user?.fullName || user?.username}! 👋\n          </h1>\n          <div className=\"mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 text-sm\">\n            <div>\n              <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Faculty</p>\n              <p className=\"font-medium\">{user?.faculty || '-'}</p>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Department</p>\n              <p className=\"font-medium\">{user?.department || '-'}</p>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Student ID</p>\n              <p className=\"font-medium\">{user?.studentId || '-'}</p>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <p className=\"text-gray-500\">Username</p>\n              <p className=\"font-medium\">{user?.username}</p>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Quiz Phases */}\n        <h2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6\">Quiz Phases</h2>\n\n        <div className=\"grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6\">\n          {/* Pre-Qualifier */}\n          <div className=\"card hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow animate-slide-up\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-xl font-semibold\">Pre-Qualifier</h3>\n              <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs text-white font-medium ${preStatus.color}`}>\n                {preStatus.label}\n              </span>\n            </div>\n            <p className=\"text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n              Self-paced quiz. Answer at your own speed before April 20.\n            </p>\n\n            {scores.PRE_QUALIFIER && scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalQuestions > 0 && (\n              <div className=\"mb-4 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg\">\n                <div className=\"flex justify-between text-sm\">\n                  <span>Score: <strong>{scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalScore}</strong></span>\n                  <span>\n                    {scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.correctAnswers}/{scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalQuestions} correct\n                  </span>\n                </div>\n                <div className=\"mt-2 h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden\">\n                  <div\n                    className=\"h-full bg-primary-500 rounded-full transition-all\"\n                    style={{\n                      width: `${(scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.correctAnswers / scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalQuestions) * 100}%`,\n                    }}\n                  />\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            )}\n\n            <Link\n              to={preStatus.disabled ? '#' : '/quiz?phase=PRE_QUALIFIER'}\n              className={`btn w-full py-3 text-lg ${\n                preStatus.disabled\n                  ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'\n                  : 'btn-primary'\n              }`}\n              onClick={(e) => preStatus.disabled && e.preventDefault()}\n            >\n              {scores.PRE_QUALIFIER?.totalQuestions ? 'Continue Quiz' : 'Start Quiz'}\n            </Link>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* Finals */}\n          <div className=\"card hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow animate-slide-up\" style={{ animationDelay: '100ms' }}>\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-4\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-xl font-semibold\">Finals</h3>\n              <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs text-white font-medium ${finalStatus.color}`}>\n                {finalStatus.label}\n              </span>\n            </div>\n            <p className=\"text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n              Timed competition round. '#' : '/quiz?phase=FINALS'}\n              className={`btn w-full py-3 text-lg ${\n                finalStatus.disabled\n                  ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'\n                  : 'btn-danger'\n              }`}\n              onClick={(e) => finalStatus.disabled && e.preventDefault()}\n            >\n              {finalStatus.disabled ? 'Locked' : 'Enter Finals'}\n            </Link>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        {/* Leaderboard Link */}\n        <div className=\"card mt-8 text-center animate-slide-up\" style={{ animationDelay: '200ms' }}>\n          <h3 className=\"text-lg font-semibold mb-2\">🏆 Leaderboard</h3>\n          <p className=\"text-gray-600 mb-4\">See how you stack up against other participants</p>\n          <Link to=\"/results\" className=\"btn btn-primary\">\n            View Leaderboard\n          </Link>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n    </Layout>\n  );\n};\n",

import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { useAuthStore } from '../store/authStore';
import { quizApi } from '../services/api';
import { Score, EventPhase } from '../types';
import { Layout } from '../components/Layout';

export const DashboardPage: React.FC = () => {
  const { user } = useAuthStore();
  const [scores, setScores] = useState<Record<EventPhase, Score | null>>({
    PRE_QUALIFIER: null,
    FINALS: null,
  });
  const [phaseStatus, setPhaseStatus] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchData() {
      try {
        const [preScore, finalScore, statusRes] = await Promise.all([
          quizApi.getScore('PRE_QUALIFIER'),
          quizApi.getScore('FINALS'),
          quizApi.getStatus(),
        ]);

        if (preScore.data) setScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, PRE_QUALIFIER: preScore.data.score }));
        if (finalScore.data) setScores((prev) => ({ ...prev, FINALS: finalScore.data.score }));
        if (statusRes.data) setPhaseStatus(statusRes.data);
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Dashboard fetch error:', err);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }

    fetchData();
  }, []);

  const preQualifierActive = (phaseStatus as { phases?: { preQualifier?: { active?: boolean } } })?.phases?.preQualifier?.active ?? false;
  const finalsActive = (phaseStatus as { phases?: { finals?: { active?: boolean } } })?.phases?.finals?.active ?? false;

  const getPreQualifierStatus = () => {
    if (!preQualifierActive) return { label: 'Closed', color: 'bg-gray-400', disabled: true };
    const score = scores.PRE_QUALIFIER;
    if (score && score.totalQuestions > 0) return { label: 'In Progress', color: 'bg-warning', disabled: false };
    return { label: 'Available', color: 'bg-success', disabled: false };
  };

  const getFinalsStatus = () => {
    if (!finalsActive) {
      const finalsData = (phaseStatus as { phases?: { finals?: { startDate?: string } } })?.phases?.finals;
      return { label: 'Not Started', color: 'bg-gray-400', disabled: true, info: finalsData?.startDate };
    }
    return { label: 'LIVE', color: 'bg-danger', disabled: false };
  };

  const preStatus = getPreQualifierStatus();
  const finalStatus = getFinalsStatus();

  return (
    <Layout>
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        {/* Welcome */}
        <div className="card mb-8 animate-slide-up">
          <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900">
            Welcome, {user?.fullName || user?.username}! 👋
          </h1>
          <div className="mt-4 grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4 text-sm">
            <div>
              <p className="text-gray-500">Faculty</p>
              <p className="font-medium">{user?.faculty || '-'}</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="text-gray-500">Department</p>
              <p className="font-medium">{user?.department || '-'}</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="text-gray-500">Student ID</p>
              <p className="font-medium">{user?.studentId || '-'}</p>
            </div>
            <div>
              <p className="text-gray-500">Username</p>
              <p className="font-medium">{user?.username}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Quiz Phases */}
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">Quiz Phases</h2>

        <div className="grid md:grid-cols-2 gap-6">
          {/* Pre-Qualifier */}
          <div className="card hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow animate-slide-up">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">Pre-Qualifier</h3>
              <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs text-white font-medium ${preStatus.color}`}>
                {preStatus.label}
              </span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
              Self-paced quiz. Answer at your own speed before April 20.
            </p>

            {scores.PRE_QUALIFIER && scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalQuestions > 0 && (
              <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                  <span>Score: <strong>{scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalScore}</strong></span>
                  <span>
                    {scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.correctAnswers}/{scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalQuestions} correct
                  </span>
                </div>
                <div className="mt-2 h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
                  <div
                    className="h-full bg-primary-500 rounded-full transition-all"
                    style={{
                      width: `${(scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.correctAnswers / scores.PRE_QUALIFIER.totalQuestions) * 100}%`,
                    }}
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            <Link
              to={preStatus.disabled ? '#' : '/quiz?phase=PRE_QUALIFIER'}
              className={`btn w-full py-3 text-lg ${
                preStatus.disabled
                  ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
                  : 'btn-primary'
              }`}
              onClick={(e) => preStatus.disabled && e.preventDefault()}
            >
              {scores.PRE_QUALIFIER?.totalQuestions ? 'Continue Quiz' : 'Start Quiz'}
            </Link>
          </div>

          {/* Finals */}
          <div className="card hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '100ms' }}>
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-4">
              <h3 className="text-xl font-semibold">Finals</h3>
              <span className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs text-white font-medium ${finalStatus.color}`}>
                {finalStatus.label}
              </span>
            </div>
            <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">
              Timed competition round. April 24, 16:45 - 18:45.
            </p>

            {scores.FINALS && scores.FINALS.totalQuestions > 0 && (
              <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <div className="flex justify-between text-sm">
                  <span>Score: <strong>{scores.FINALS.totalScore}</strong></span>
                  <span>
                    {scores.FINALS.correctAnswers}/{scores.FINALS.totalQuestions} correct
                  </span>
                </div>
              </div>
            )}

            <Link
              to={finalStatus.disabled ? '#' : '/quiz?phase=FINALS'}
              className={`btn w-full py-3 text-lg ${
                finalStatus.disabled
                  ? 'bg-gray-300 text-gray-500 cursor-not-allowed'
                  : 'btn-danger'
              }`}
              onClick={(e) => finalStatus.disabled && e.preventDefault()}
            >
              {finalStatus.disabled ? 'Locked' : 'Enter Finals'}
            </Link>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Leaderboard Link */}
        <div className="card mt-8 text-center animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '200ms' }}>
          <h3 className="text-lg font-semibold mb-2">🏆 Leaderboard</h3>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mb-4">See how you stack up against other participants</p>
          <Link to="/results" className="btn btn-primary">
            View Leaderboard
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </Layout>
  );
};

```

```diff
import React, { useEffect, useState, useCallback, useRef } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Layout } from '../components/Layout';
import { Timer } from '../components/Timer';
import { QuizCard } from '../components/QuizCard';
import { FeedbackOverlay } from '../components/FeedbackOverlay';
import { quizApi } from '../services/api';
import { Question, SubmitResult, EventPhase } from '../types';

export const QuizPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const phase = (searchParams.get('phase') as EventPhase) || 'PRE_QUALIFIER';

  const [questions, setQuestions] = useState<Question[]>([]);
  const [currentIndex, setCurrentIndex] = useState(0);
  const [selectedAnswer, setSelectedAnswer] = useState('');
  const [timeLeft, setTimeLeft] = useState(30);
  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(true);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [feedback, setFeedback] = useState<SubmitResult | null>(null);
  const [error, setError] = useState('');
  const [startTime, setStartTime] = useState<number>(0);

  const timerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null>(null);

  const currentQuestion = questions[currentIndex];

  // Load questions
  useEffect(() => {
    async function loadQuestions() {
      setIsLoading(true);
      try {
        const response = await quizApi.getQuestions(phase);
        if (response.error) {
          setError(response.error);
          return;
        }
        const data = response.data as { questions: Question[] };
        // Filter out already-answered questions
        const unanswered = data.questions.filter((q) => !q.answered);
        setQuestions(unanswered);
        if (unanswered.length > 0) {
          setTimeLeft(unanswered[0].timeLimit);
        }
      } catch {
        setError('Failed to load questions');
      } finally {
        setIsLoading(false);
      }
    }
    loadQuestions();
  }, [phase]);

  // Timer logic
  useEffect(() => {
    if (!currentQuestion || feedback || isSubmitting) return;

    setTimeLeft(currentQuestion.timeLimit);
    setStartTime(Date.now());

    if (timerRef.current) clearInterval(timerRef.current);

    timerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
      setTimeLeft((prev) => {
        if (prev <= 1) {
          // Time's up - auto submit with empty/timeout
          handleTimeout();
          return 0;
        }
        return prev - 1;
      });
    }, 1000);

    return () => {
      if (timerRef.current) clearInterval(timerRef.current);
    };
  }, [currentIndex, currentQuestion?.id]);

  const handleTimeout = useCallback(async () => {
    if (!currentQuestion || isSubmitting || feedback) return;

    setIsSubmitting(true);
    const timeTaken = Date.now() - startTime;

    try {
      await quizApi.submitAnswer(currentQuestion.id, '__TIMEOUT__', timeTaken);
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Timeout submission error:', err);
    }

    // Move to next question
    moveToNext();
  }, [currentQuestion, isSubmitting, feedback, startTime]);

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!currentQuestion || !selectedAnswer.trim() || isSubmitting || feedback) return;

    setIsSubmitting(true);
    const timeTaken = Date.now() - startTime;

    try {
      const response = await quizApi.submitAnswer(currentQuestion.id, selectedAnswer.trim(), timeTaken);

      if (response.error) {
        setError(response.error);
        setIsSubmitting(false);
        return;
      }

      const result = response.data as SubmitResult;
      setFeedback(result);
    } catch {
      setError('Failed to submit answer');
      setIsSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const moveToNext = useCallback(() => {
    setFeedback(null);
    setSelectedAnswer('');
    setError('');
    setIsSubmitting(false);

    if (currentIndex < questions.length - 1) {
      setCurrentIndex((prev) => prev + 1);
    } else {
      // Quiz complete
      navigate(`/results?phase=${phase}`);
    }
  }, [currentIndex, questions.length, phase, navigate]);

  // Keyboard support
  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if (feedback || isSubmitting) return;

      if (currentQuestion?.type !== 'SHORT_ANSWER') {
        const options = currentQuestion?.options || [];
        if (e.key >= '1' && e.key <= '9') {
          const idx = parseInt(e.key) - 1;
          if (idx < options.length) {
            setSelectedAnswer(options[idx]);
          }
        }
      }

      if (e.key === 'Enter' && selectedAnswer) {
        handleSubmit();
      }
    };

    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
  }, [selectedAnswer, feedback, isSubmitting, currentQuestion]);

  if (isLoading) {
    return (
      <Layout>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <svg className="animate-spin h-12 w-12 mx-auto text-primary-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
              <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
            </svg>
            <p className="mt-4 text-gray-600">Loading questions...</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Layout>
    );
  }

  if (questions.length === 0) {
    return (
      <Layout>
        <div className="text-center py-16">
          <span className="text-6xl">🎉</span>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4">All Questions Answered!</h2>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">You've completed all questions for this phase.</p>
          <button onClick={() => navigate(`/results?phase=${phase}`)} className="btn btn-primary mt-6">
            View Results
          </button>
        </div>
      </Layout>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Layout>
      <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto">
        {/* Progress */}
        <div className="mb-6">
          <div className="flex justify-between text-sm text-gray-600 mb-2">
            <span>Question {currentIndex + 1} of {questions.length}</span>
            <span>{phase === 'FINALS' ? '🔴 Finals' : '🟢 Pre-Qualifier'}</span>
          </div>
          <div className="h-2 bg-gray-200 rounded-full overflow-hidden">
            <div
              className="h-full bg-primary-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-300"
              style={{ width: `${((currentIndex + 1) / questions.length) * 100}%` }}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {error && (
          <div className="mb-4 p-3 bg-red-50 border border-red-200 text-red-700 rounded-lg text-sm">
            {error}
          </div>
        )}

        {/* Quiz Card */}
        <QuizCard
          question={currentQuestion}
          questionNumber={currentIndex + 1}
          totalQuestions={questions.length}
        >
          {/* Timer */}
          <div className="mb-6">
            <Timer
              seconds={timeLeft}
              totalSeconds={currentQuestion.timeLimit}
              onTimeout={handleTimeout}
            />
          </div>

          {/* Multiple Choice / True-False */}
          {(currentQuestion.type === 'MULTIPLE_CHOICE' || currentQuestion.type === 'TRUE_FALSE') && (
            <div className="space-y-3">
              {currentQuestion.options?.map((option, idx) => (
                <button
                  key={idx}
                  onClick={() => setSelectedAnswer(option)}
                  className={`option-btn ${
                    selectedAnswer === option ? 'selected' : ''
                  }`}
                  disabled={isSubmitting || !!feedback}
                >
                  <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-3">
                    <span className="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gray-200 flex items-center justify-center text-sm font-medium text-gray-600 shrink-0">
                      {idx + 1}
                    </span>
                    <span>{option}</span>
                  </span>
                </button>
              ))}
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Short Answer */}
          {currentQuestion.type === 'SHORT_ANSWER' && (
            <div>
              <textarea
                className="input resize-none"
                rows={3}
                value={selectedAnswer}
                onChange={(e) => setSelectedAnswer(e.target.value)}
                placeholder="Type your answer here..."
                disabled={isSubmitting || !!feedback}
              />
              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500 mt-2">
                💡 Match any key concept to score points
              </p>
            </div>
          )}

          {/* Submit Button */}
          <button
            onClick={handleSubmit}
            disabled={!selectedAnswer.trim() || isSubmitting || !!feedback}
            className={`btn w-full py-3 text-lg mt-6 ${
              selectedAnswer.trim() && !isSubmitting && !feedback
                ? 'btn-primary'
                : 'bg-gray-200 text-gray-400 cursor-not-allowed'
            }`}
          >
            {isSubmitting ? (
              <span className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2">
                <svg className="animate-spin h-5 w-5" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
                  <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
                  <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
                </svg>
                Submitting...
              </span>
            ) : (
              'Submit Answer'
            )}
          </button>
        </QuizCard>

        {/* Feedback Overlay */}
        {feedback && (
          <FeedbackOverlay
            isCorrect={feedback.submission.isCorrect}
            correctAnswer={feedback.correctAnswer}
            explanation={feedback.explanation}
            onContinue={moveToNext}
          />
        )}
      </div>
    </Layout>
  );
};

```

```diff
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { useSearchParams, Link } from 'react-router-dom';
import { Layout } from '../components/Layout';
import { quizApi } from '../services/api';
import { Score, LeaderboardEntry, EventPhase } from '../types';

export const ResultsPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [searchParams] = useSearchParams();
  const phase = (searchParams.get('phase') as EventPhase) || 'PRE_QUALIFIER';

  const [score, setScore] = useState<Score | null>(null);
  const [totalAvailable, setTotalAvailable] = useState(0);
  const [leaderboard, setLeaderboard] = useState<LeaderboardEntry[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);

  useEffect(() => {
    async function fetchData() {
      setLoading(true);
      try {
        const [scoreRes, leaderboardRes] = await Promise.all([
          quizApi.getScore(phase),
          quizApi.getLeaderboard(phase),
        ]);

        if (scoreRes.data) {
          setScore(scoreRes.data.score);
          setTotalAvailable(scoreRes.data.totalAvailable);
        }

        if (leaderboardRes.data) {
          setLeaderboard(leaderboardRes.data.leaderboard);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        console.error('Results fetch error:', err);
      } finally {
        setLoading(false);
      }
    }
    fetchData();
  }, [phase]);

  const percentage = score && totalAvailable > 0
    ? Math.round((score.correctAnswers / totalAvailable) * 100)
    : 0;

  const getGrade = () => {
    if (percentage >= 90) return { emoji: '🏆', label: 'Outstanding!', color: 'text-yellow-500' };
    if (percentage >= 70) return { emoji: '🌟', label: 'Great Job!', color: 'text-green-500' };
    if (percentage >= 50) return { emoji: '👍', label: 'Good Effort!', color: 'text-blue-500' };
    if (percentage >= 30) return { emoji: '💪', label: 'Keep Trying!', color: 'text-orange-500' };
    return { emoji: '📚', label: 'Study More!', color: 'text-red-500' };
  };

  const grade = getGrade();

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <Layout>
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh]">
          <div className="text-center">
            <svg className="animate-spin h-12 w-12 mx-auto text-primary-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
              <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
            </svg>
            <p className="mt-4 text-gray-600">Loading results...</p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </Layout>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Layout>
      <div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto">
        {/* Score Summary */}
        <div className="card mb-8 text-center animate-slide-up">
          <div className="text-6xl mb-4">{grade.emoji}</div>
          <h1 className={`text-3xl font-bold ${grade.color}`}>{grade.label}</h1>
          <p className="text-gray-600 mt-2">
            {phase === 'FINALS' ? 'Finals' : 'Pre-Qualifier'} Results
          </p>

          {score ? (
            <div className="mt-6 grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
              <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-primary-600">{score.totalScore}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Total Score</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-success">{score.correctAnswers}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Correct</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-danger">{score.totalQuestions - score.correctAnswers}</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Incorrect</p>
              </div>
              <div className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                <p className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-700">{percentage}%</p>
                <p className="text-sm text-gray-600">Accuracy</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="mt-6 py-8">
              <p className="text-gray-500">You haven't answered any questions yet.</p>
              <Link to={`/quiz?phase=${phase}`} className="btn btn-primary mt-4">
                Start Quiz
              </Link>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Leaderboard */}
        <div className="card animate-slide-up" style={{ animationDelay: '100ms' }}>
          <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">🏆 Leaderboard</h2>

          {leaderboard.length === 0 ? (
            <p className="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No participants yet.</p>
          ) : (
            <div className="overflow-x-auto">
              <table className="w-full">
                <thead>
                  <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                    <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Rank</th>
                    <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Name</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-3 px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Score</th>
                    <th className="text-center py-3 px-4 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Correct</th>
                  </tr>
                </thead>
                <tbody>
                  {leaderboard.map((entry) => (
                    <tr
                      key={entry.rank}
                      className={`border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50 transition-colors ${
                        entry.rank <= 3 ? 'bg-yellow-50/50' : ''
                      }`}
                    >
                      <td className="py-3 px-4">
                        <span className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full font-bold text-sm ${
                          entry.rank === 1 ? 'bg-yellow-400 text-white' :
                          entry.rank === 2 ? 'bg-gray-400 text-white' :
                          entry.rank === 3 ? 'bg-amber-600 text-white' :
                          'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                        }`}>
                          {entry.rank}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4">
                        <p className="font-medium">{entry.fullName}</p>
                        <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{entry.department}</p>
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4 text-center font-bold text-primary-600">
                        {entry.totalScore}
                      </td>
                      <td className="py-3 px-4 text-center">
                        <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                          entry.totalQuestions > 0 && (entry.correctAnswers / entry.totalQuestions) >= 0.7
                            ? 'bg-green-100 text-green-800'
                            : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                        }`}>
                          {entry.correctAnswers}/{entry.totalQuestions}
                        </span>
                      </td>
                    </tr>
                  ))}
                </tbody>
              </table>
            </div>
          )}
        </div>

        {/* Back to Dashboard */}
        <div className="text-center mt-8">
          <Link to="/dashboard" className="btn btn-primary">
            ← Back to Dashboard
          </Link>
        </div>
      </div>
    </Layout>
  );
};

```

```diff
import { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Routes, Route, Navigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import { LoginPage } from './pages/LoginPage';
import { RegisterPage } from './pages/RegisterPage';
import { ProfileSetupPage } from './pages/ProfileSetupPage';
import { DashboardPage } from './pages/DashboardPage';
import { QuizPage } from './pages/QuizPage';
import { ResultsPage } from './pages/ResultsPage';
import { AdminPage } from './pages/AdminPage';
import { useAuthStore, initializeAuth } from './store/authStore';
import { getToken } from './services/api';

// Protected route wrapper
const ProtectedRoute: React.FC<{ children: React.ReactNode; requireProfile?: boolean; requireAdmin?: boolean }> = ({
  children,
  requireProfile = true,
  requireAdmin = false,
}) => {
  const { isAuthenticated, user } = useAuthStore();

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return <Navigate to="/login" replace />;
  }

  if (requireProfile && !user?.profileComplete) {
    return <Navigate to="/profile-setup" replace />;
  }

  if (requireAdmin && user?.role !== 'ADMIN') {
    return <Navigate to="/dashboard" replace />;
  }

  return <>{children}</>;
};

function App() {
  const [isInitializing, setIsInitializing] = useState(true);
  const { login } = useAuthStore();

  useEffect(() => {
    async function init() {
      const token = getToken();
      if (token) {
        await initializeAuth();
      }
      setIsInitializing(false);
    }
    init();
  }, []);

  if (isInitializing) {
    return (
      <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50">
        <div className="text-center">
          <span className="text-5xl">📝</span>
          <div className="mt-4">
            <svg className="animate-spin h-8 w-8 mx-auto text-primary-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
              <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <Routes>
      {/* Public routes */}
      <Route path="/login" element={<LoginPage />} />
      <Route path="/register" element={<RegisterPage />} />

      {/* Protected routes */}
      <Route
        path="/profile-setup"
        element={
          <ProtectedRoute requireProfile={false}>
            <ProfileSetupPage />
          </ProtectedRoute>
        }
      />
      <Route
        path="/dashboard"
        element={
          <ProtectedRoute>
            <DashboardPage />
          </ProtectedRoute>
        }
      />
      <Route
        path="/quiz"
        element={
          <ProtectedRoute>
            <QuizPage />
          </ProtectedRoute>
        }
      />
      <Route
        path="/results"
        element={
          <ProtectedRoute>
            <ResultsPage />
          </ProtectedRoute>
        }
      />
      <Route
        path="/admin"
        element={
          <ProtectedRoute requireAdmin>
            <AdminPage />
          </ProtectedRoute>
        }
      />

      {/* Default redirect */}
      <Route path="/" element={<Navigate to="/login" replace />} />
      <Route path="*" element={<Navigate to="/login" replace />} />
    </Routes>
  );
}

export default App;

```

  "content": "import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';\nimport { Layout } from '../components/Layout';\nimport { adminApi } from '../services/api';\nimport { User, Question, LeaderboardEntry } from '../types';\n\ntype AdminTab = 'users' | 'questions' | 'leaderboard' | 'monitor';\n\nexport const AdminPage: React.FC = () => {\n  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<AdminTab>('users');\n  const [users, setUsers] = useState<User[]>([]);\n  const [questions, setQuestions] = useState<Question[]>([]);\n  const [leaderboard, setLeaderboard] = className=\"font-medium\">{user.fullName || '-'}</p>\n                              <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">{user.username}</p>\n                            </td>\n <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${\n                                user.role === 'ADMIN' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'\n                              }`}>\n                                {user.role}\n                              </span>\n                     className=\"btn btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3\"\n                              >\n                                Edit\n                              </button>\n                            </td>\n                          </tr>\n                        ))}\n                      </tbody>\n                    </table>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n\n                {/* Edit Modal */}\n                {editingUser && (\n                  <div className=\"fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4 animate-fade-in\">\n className=\"space-y-4\">\n                        <div>\n                          <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\">Full Name</label>\n                          <input\n                            className=\"input\"\n                            value={editForm.fullName}\n                            onChange={(e) => setEditForm((p) => ({ ...p, fullName: e.target.value }))}\n                          />\n                        </div>\n                        <div>\n                          <label className=\"block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1\">Student ID</label>\n                          <input\n                            className=\"input\"\n                            value={editForm.studentId}\n                            onChange={(e) => setEditForm((p) => ({ ...p, studentId: e.target.value }))}\n                          />\n                        </div>\n                        <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                          <button onClick={saveEditUser} className=\"btn btn-primary flex-1\">Save</button>\n                          <button onClick={() => setEditingUser(null)} className=\"btn btn-secondary flex-1\">Cancel</button>\n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            )}\n\n            {/* ── Questions Tab ── */}\n            {activeTab === 'questions' && (\n              <div className=\"card animate-fade-in\">\n                <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-4\">Questions ({questions.length})</h2>\n\n                {questions.length === 0 ? (\n                  <p className=\"text-center text-gray-500 py-8\">No questions found.</p>\n                ) : (\n                  <div className=\"space-y-4\">\n                    {questions.map((q) => (\n                      <div key={q.id} className=\"p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg\">\n                        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-2\">\n                          <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${\n                            q.phase === 'PRE_QUALIFIER' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'\n                          }`}>\n                            {q.phase}\n                          </span>\n                          <span className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">\n                            {q.type.replace('_', ' ')} • {q.timeLimit}s • {q.points}pts\n                          </span>\n                        </div>\n                        <p className=\"font-medium\">{q.questionText}</p>\n                        <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-600 mt-1\">\n                          Answer: <strong>{typeof q.options === 'object' && q.options !== null ? (\n                  <p className=\"text-center text-gray-500 py-8\">No participants yet.</p>\n                ) : (\n                  <div className=\"overflow-x-auto\">\n                    <table className=\"w-full\">\n                      <thead>\n                        <tr className=\"border-b border-gray-200\">\n                          <th className=\"text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600\">#</th>\n                          <th className=\"text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600\">Name</th>\n                          <th className=\"text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 hidden sm:table-cell\">Student ID</th>\n                          <th className=\"text-center py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600\">Score</th>\n                          <th className=\"text-center py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600\">Correct</th>\n                        </tr>\n                      </thead>\n                      <tbody>\n                        {leaderboard.map((entry) => (\n                          <tr key={entry.rank} className=\"border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50\">\n                            <td className=\"py-3 px-3\">\n                              <span className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full font-bold text-sm ${\n                                entry.rank === 1 ? 'bg-yellow-400 text-white' :\n                                entry.rank === 2 ? 'bg-gray-400 text-white' :\n                                entry.rank === 3 ? 'bg-amber-600 text-white' :\n                                'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'\n                              }`}>\n                                {entry.rank}\n                              </span>\n                            </td>\n                            <td className=\"py-3 px-3\">\n                              <p className=\"font-medium\">{entry.fullName}</p>\n                              <p className=\"text-xs text-gray-500\">{entry.department}</p>\n                            </td>\n                            <td className=\"py-3 px-3 text-sm font-mono hidden sm:table-cell\">{entry.studentId}</td>\n                            <td className=\"py-3 px-3 text-center font-bold text-primary-600\">{entry.totalScore}</td>\n                            <td className=\"py-3 px-3 text-center\">{entry.correctAnswers}/{entry.totalQuestions}</td>\n                          </tr>\n                        ))}\n                      </tbody>\n                    </table>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            )}\n\n            {/* ── Monitor Tab ── */}\n            {activeTab === 'monitor' && (\n              <div className=\"card animate-fade-in\">\n                <h2 className=\"text-xl font-bold mb-4\">📊 Live Participant Monitoring</h2>\n\n                {!monitorData || !(monitorData as Record<string, unknown>)?.participants ? (\n                  <p className=\"text-center text-gray-500 py-8\">No monitoring data available.</p>\n                ) : (\n                  <div>\n                    <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4\">\n                      Phase: <strong>{String((monitorData as Record<string, string>).phase)}</strong> |\n                      Participants: <strong>{(monitorData as Record<string, number>).totalParticipants}</strong>\n                    </p>\n                    <div className=\"grid gap-3\">\n                      {((monitorData as { participants?: Array<Record<string, unknown>> }).participants || []).map((p) => (\n                        <div key={String(p.id)} className=\"p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-2\">\n                          <div>\n                            <p className=\"font-medium\">{String(p.fullName)}</p>\n                            <p className=\"text-sm text-gray-500\">{String(p.studentId)}</p>\n                          </div>\n                          <div className=\"flex gap-4 text-sm\">\n                            <span>Score: <strong>{String((p.score as Record<string, unknown>)?.totalScore || 0)}</strong></span>\n                            <span>Answered: <strong>{String(p.submissionCount)}</strong></span>\n                          </div>\n                        </div>\n                      ))}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            )}\n          </>\n        )}\n      </div>\n    </Layout>\n  );\n};\n",
