*Diff for `AdminPage.tsx`:*
```diff
import React, { useEffect, useState } from 'react';
import { Layout } from '../components/Layout';
import { adminApi } from '../services/api';
import { User, Question, LeaderboardEntry } from '../types';

type AdminTab = 'users' | 'questions' | 'leaderboard' | 'monitor';

export const AdminPage: React.FC = () => {
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<AdminTab>('users');
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<User[]>([]);
  const [questions, setQuestions] = useState<Question[]>([]);
  const [leaderboard, setLeaderboard] = useState<LeaderboardEntry[]>([]);
  const [monitorData, setMonitorData] = useState<Record<string, unknown> | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState('');
  const [editingUser, setEditingUser] = useState<User | null>(null);
  const [editForm, setEditForm] = useState({ fullName: '', studentId: '' });

  const tabs: { key: AdminTab; label: string; icon: string }[] = [
    { key: 'users', label: 'Users', icon: '👥' },
    { key: 'questions', label: 'Questions', icon: '❓' },
    { key: 'leaderboard', label: 'Leaderboard', icon: '🏆' },
    { key: 'monitor', label: 'Monitor', icon: '📊' },
  ];

  useEffect(() => {
    loadData();
  }, [activeTab]);

  async function loadData() {
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      switch (activeTab) {
        case 'users': {
          const res = await adminApi.getUsers({ search: searchQuery || undefined });
          if (res.data) {
            const data = res.data as Record<string, unknown>;
            setUsers((data.users as User[]) || []);
          }
          break;
        }
        case 'questions': {
          const res = await adminApi.getQuestions();
          if (res.data) {
            const data = res.data as Record<string, unknown>;
            setQuestions((data.questions as Question[]) || []);
          }
          break;
        }
        case 'leaderboard': {
          const res = await adminApi.getLeaderboard();
          if (res.data) {
            const data = res.data as Record<string, unknown>;
            setLeaderboard((data.leaderboard as LeaderboardEntry[]) || []);
          }
          break;
        }
        case 'monitor': {
          const res = await adminApi.getMonitor();
          if (res.data) {
            setMonitorData(res.data as Record<string, unknown>);
          }
          break;
        }
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Admin data load error:', err);
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  }

  const handleSearch = (e: React.FormEvent) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    loadData();
  };

  const startEditUser = (user: User) => {
    setEditingUser(user);
    setEditForm({
      fullName: user.fullName || '',
      studentId: user.studentId || '',
    });
  };

  const saveEditUser = async () => {
    if (!editingUser) return;

    try {
      const res = await adminApi.updateUser(editingUser.id, {
        fullName: editForm.fullName,
        studentId: editForm.studentId,
      });

      if (res.error) {
        alert(res.error);
        return;
      }

      setEditingUser(null);
      loadData();
    } catch {
      alert('Failed to update user');
    }
  };

  return (
    <Layout>
      <div className="max-w-6xl mx-auto">
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-gray-900 mb-6">🔧 Admin Dashboard</h1>

        {/* Tab Navigation */}
        <div className="flex gap-2 mb-8 overflow-x-auto">
          {tabs.map((tab) => (
            <button
              key={tab.key}
              onClick={() => setActiveTab(tab.key)}
              className={`btn whitespace-nowrap ${
                activeTab === tab.key
                  ? 'btn-primary'
                  : 'btn-secondary'
              }`}
            >
              {tab.icon} {tab.label}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>

        {/* Tab Content */}
        {loading ? (
          <div className="text-center py-12">
            <svg className="animate-spin h-10 w-10 mx-auto text-primary-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24">
              <circle className="opacity-25" cx="12" cy="12" r="10" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="4" fill="none" />
              <path className="opacity-75" fill="currentColor" d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4z" />
            </svg>
          </div>
        ) : (
          <>
            {/* ── Users Tab ── */}
            {activeTab === 'users' && (
              <div className="card animate-fade-in">
                <div className="flex flex-col sm:flex-row gap-4 mb-6">
                  <form onSubmit={handleSearch} className="flex-1 flex gap-2">
                    <input
                      type="text"
                      className="input flex-1"
                      placeholder="Search users..."
                      value={searchQuery}
                      onChange={(e) => setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
                    />
                    <button type="submit" className="btn btn-primary">
                      Search
                    </button>
                  </form>
                </div>

                {users.length === 0 ? (
                  <p className="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No users found.</p>
                ) : (
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="w-full">
                      <thead>
                        <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Name</th>
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 hidden sm:table-cell">Email</th>
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 hidden md:table-cell">Faculty</th>
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Student ID</th>
                          <th className="text-center py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Role</th>
                          <th className="text-center py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Actions</th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody>
                        {users.map((user) => (
                          <tr key={user.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50">
                            <td className="py-3 px-3">
                              <p className="font-medium">{user.fullName || '-'}</p>
                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{user.username}</p>
                            </td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-sm hidden sm:table-cell">{user.email}</td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-sm hidden md:table-cell">{user.faculty || '-'}</td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-sm font-mono">{user.studentId || '-'}</td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-center">
                              <span className={`px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
                                user.role === 'ADMIN' ? 'bg-red-100 text-red-800' : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'
                              }`}>
                                {user.role}
                              </span>
                            </td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-center">
                              <button
                                onClick={() => startEditUser(user)}
                                className="btn btn-secondary text-xs py-1 px-3"
                              >
                                Edit
                              </button>
                            </td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                )}

                {/* Edit Modal */}
                {editingUser && (
                  <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 flex items-center justify-center z-50 p-4 animate-fade-in">
                    <div className="bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-2xl p-6 max-w-md w-full animate-slide-up">
                      <h3 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Edit User</h3>
                      <div className="space-y-4">
                        <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Full Name</label>
                          <input
                            className="input"
                            value={editForm.fullName}
                            onChange={(e) => setEditForm((p) => ({ ...p, fullName: e.target.value }))}
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div>
                          <label className="block text-sm font-medium text-gray-700 mb-1">Student ID</label>
                          <input
                            className="input"
                            value={editForm.studentId}
                            onChange={(e) => setEditForm((p) => ({ ...p, studentId: e.target.value }))}
                          />
                        </div>
                        <div className="flex gap-2">
                          <button onClick={saveEditUser} className="btn btn-primary flex-1">Save</button>
                          <button onClick={() => setEditingUser(null)} className="btn btn-secondary flex-1">Cancel</button>
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {/* ── Questions Tab ── */}
            {activeTab === 'questions' && (
              <div className="card animate-fade-in">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">Questions ({questions.length})</h2>

                {questions.length === 0 ? (
                  <p className="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No questions found.</p>
                ) : (
                  <div className="space-y-4">
                    {questions.map((q) => (
                      <div key={q.id} className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg">
                        <div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                          <span className={`text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-full font-medium ${
                            q.phase === 'PRE_QUALIFIER' ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800' : 'bg-red-100 text-red-800'
                          }`}>
                            {q.phase}
                          </span>
                          <span className="text-xs text-gray-500">
                            {q.type.replace('_', ' ')} • {q.timeLimit}s
                          </span>
                        </div>
                        <p className="font-medium">{q.questionText}</p>
                      </div>
                    ))}
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {/* ── Leaderboard Tab ── */}
            {activeTab === 'leaderboard' && (
              <div className="card animate-fade-in">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">🏆 Full Leaderboard</h2>

                {leaderboard.length === 0 ? (
                  <p className="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No participants yet.</p>
                ) : (
                  <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                    <table className="w-full">
                      <thead>
                        <tr className="border-b border-gray-200">
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">#</th>
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Name</th>
                          <th className="text-left py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600 hidden sm:table-cell">Student ID</th>
                          <th className="text-center py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Score</th>
                          <th className="text-center py-3 px-3 text-sm font-semibold text-gray-600">Correct</th>
                        </tr>
                      </thead>
                      <tbody>
                        {leaderboard.map((entry) => (
                          <tr key={entry.rank} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50">
                            <td className="py-3 px-3">
                              <span className={`inline-flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full font-bold text-sm ${
                                entry.rank === 1 ? 'bg-yellow-400 text-white' :
                                entry.rank === 2 ? 'bg-gray-400 text-white' :
                                entry.rank === 3 ? 'bg-amber-600 text-white' :
                                'bg-gray-100 text-gray-600'
                              }`}>
                                {entry.rank}
                              </span>
                            </td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3">
                              <p className="font-medium">{entry.fullName}</p>
                              <p className="text-xs text-gray-500">{entry.department}</p>
                            </td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-sm font-mono hidden sm:table-cell">{entry.studentId}</td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-center font-bold text-primary-600">{entry.totalScore}</td>
                            <td className="py-3 px-3 text-center">{entry.correctAnswers}/{entry.totalQuestions}</td>
                          </tr>
                        ))}
                      </tbody>
                    </table>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}

            {/* ── Monitor Tab ── */}
            {activeTab === 'monitor' && (
              <div className="card animate-fade-in">
                <h2 className="text-xl font-bold mb-4">📊 Live Participant Monitoring</h2>

                {!monitorData || !(monitorData as Record<string, unknown>)?.participants ? (
                  <p className="text-center text-gray-500 py-8">No monitoring data available.</p>
                ) : (
                  <div>
                    <p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-4">
                      Phase: <strong>{String((monitorData as Record<string, string>).phase)}</strong> |
                      Participants: <strong>{(monitorData as Record<string, number>).totalParticipants}</strong>
                    </p>
                    <div className="grid gap-3">
                      {((monitorData as { participants?: Array<Record<string, unknown>> }).participants || []).map((p) => (
                        <div key={String(p.id)} className="p-4 bg-gray-50 rounded-lg flex flex-col sm:flex-row sm:items-center sm:justify-between gap-2">
                          <div>
                            <p className="font-medium">{String(p.fullName)}</p>
                            <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{String(p.studentId)}</p>
                          </div>
                          <div className="flex gap-4 text-sm">
                            <span>Score: <strong>{String((p.score as Record<string, unknown>)?.totalScore || 0)}</strong></span>
                            <span>Answered: <strong>{String(p.submissionCount)}</strong></span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      ))}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                )}
              </div>
            )}
          </>
        )}
      </div>
    </Layout>
  );
};

```

@tailwind base;
@tailwind components;
@tailwind utilities;

@layer base {
  body {
    @apply bg-gray-50 text-gray-900;
    font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  }
}

@layer components {
  .btn {
    @apply inline-flex items-center justify-center px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed;
  }
  .btn-primary {
    @apply btn bg-primary-600 text-white hover:bg-primary-700 focus:ring-primary-500;
  }
  .btn-secondary {
    @apply btn bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 hover:bg-gray-300 focus:ring-gray-400;
  }
  .btn-danger {
    @apply btn bg-danger text-white hover:bg-red-600 focus:ring-red-500;
  }
  .btn-success {
    @apply btn bg-success text-white hover:bg-green-600 focus:ring-green-500;
  }
  
  .input {
    @apply w-full px-4 py-2 border border-gray-300 rounded-lg focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500 focus:border-primary-500 outline-none transition-all duration-200;
  }
  
  .card {
    @apply bg-white rounded-xl shadow-md p-6 border border-gray-100;
  }
  
  .timer-bar {
    @apply h-2 bg-primary-500 rounded-full transition-all duration-1000 ease-linear;
  }
  
  .option-btn {
    @apply w-full text-left px-4 py-3 rounded-lg border-2 border-gray-200 hover:border-primary-400 hover:bg-primary-50 transition-all duration-200 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary-500;
  }
  .option-btn.selected {
    @apply border-primary-500 bg-primary-100;
  }
  .option-btn.correct {
    @apply border-success bg-green-100;
  }
  .option-btn.wrong {
    @apply border-danger bg-red-100;
  }
}

```

## ✅ Phase 3 Complete

### Frontend Implementation

**State & Services:**
- `api.ts` — Full API client with JWT token management for auth, quiz, and admin endpoints
- `authStore.ts` — Zustand store with login/logout/auth initialization
- `types/index.ts` — Full TypeScript types for all entities

**Components:**
- `Layout.tsx` — App shell with header (logo, user info, admin link, logout) and footer
- `Timer.tsx` — Animated countdown bar with color states (green → yellow → red pulse)
- `QuizCard.tsx` — Question display card with type badges and progress
- `FeedbackOverlay.tsx` — Full-screen modal with ✅/❌, correct answer, explanation, 3s auto-continue

**Pages:**
- `LoginPage` — Email/username + password, redirect to profile-setup or dashboard
- `RegisterPage` — Full registration with password confirmation
- `ProfileSetupPage` — One-time profile entry with warning about immutability
- `DashboardPage` — Welcome card with user info, Pre-Qualifier & Finals phase cards (active/in-progress/complete states), progress bars, leaderboard link
- `QuizPage` — Full quiz flow: timer, MC/TF option buttons, short answer textarea, submit, 3s feedback overlay, keyboard shortcuts (1-9 for options, Enter to submit), auto-skip on timeout
- `ResultsPage` — Score summary with grade emoji, accuracy %, full leaderboard table with ranked badges
- `AdminPage` — Tabbed dashboard (Users, Questions, Leaderboard, Monitor) with search, edit modal, question listing, participant tracking

**Routing & Guards:**
- Protected routes requiring auth
- Profile completion guard
- Admin-only route protection
- Auto-redirect from root to login

### Verification
- ✅ `tsc --noEmit` (server) — zero errors
- ✅ `tsc --noEmit` (client) — zero errors
- ✅ `vite build` — production bundle (275KB JS, 22KB CSS)

RUN apk add --no-cache openssl

WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json ./

RUN npm install --production

COPY . .

RUN npx prisma generate

RUN npm run build

EXPOSE 5000

WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json ./

RUN npm install

COPY . .

RUN npm run build

# Production stage
FROM nginx:alpine

COPY --from=builder /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

COPY nginx-frontend.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

{
  "content": "server {\n    listen 80;\n    server_name _;\n    root /usr/share/nginx/html;\n    index index.html;\n\n    # SPA fallback - all routes go to index.html\n    location / {\n        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;\n    }\n\n    # Cache static assets\n    location ~* \\.(js|css|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|ico|svg|woff|woff2|ttf|eot)$ {\n        expires 1y;\n        add_header Cache-Control \"public, immutable\";\n    }\n\n    # Disable cache for index.html\n    location = /index.html {\n        add_header Cache-Control \"no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate\";\n    }\n\n    # Security headers\n    add_header X-Frame-Options \"SAMEORIGIN\" always;\n    add_header X-Content-Type-Options \"nosniff\" always;\n    add_header X-XSS-Protection \"1; mode=block\" always;\n    add_header Referrer-Policy \"strict-origin-when-cross-origin\" always;\n}\n",

**Affected Files:**
- `C:\Users\chrom\Desktop\Coding\WebDev\PoemQuizzer\docker\nginx-frontend.conf`

**Output:**

*Diff for `nginx-frontend.conf`:*
```diff
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name _;
    root /usr/share/nginx/html;
    index index.html;

    # SPA fallback - all routes go to index.html
    location / {
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }

    # Cache static assets
    location ~* \.(js|css|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|ico|svg|woff|woff2|ttf|eot)$ {
        expires 1y;
        add_header Cache-Control "public, immutable";
    }

    # Disable cache for index.html
    location = /index.html {
        add_header Cache-Control "no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate";
    }

    # Security headers
    add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
    add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
    add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
    add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;
}

```

Rate limiting zones\n  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=api_limit:10m rate=10r/s;\n  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=login_limit:10m rate=3r/m;\n\n  upstream backend {\n    server server:5000;\n  }\n\n  upstream frontend {\n    server client:80;\n  }\n\n  # HTTP Server\n  server {\n    listen 80;\n    server_name _;\n\n    # Redirect HTTP to HTTPS when SSL is enabled\n    # Uncomment the line below when SSL certificates are configured\n    # return 301 https://$host$request_uri;\n\n    # API proxy\n    location /api/ {\n      limit_req zone=api_limit burst=20 nodelay;\n\n      proxy_pass http://backend;\n      proxy_set_header Host $host;\n      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n      proxy_connect_timeout 30s;\n      proxy_read_timeout 60s;\n    }\n\n    # Login endpoint - stricter rate limit\n    location = /api/auth/login {\n      limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;\n\n      proxy_pass http://backend;\n      proxy_set_header Host $host;\n      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n    }\n\n    # Registration endpoint - stricter rate limit\n    location = /api/auth/register {\n      limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;\n\n      proxy_pass http://backend;\n      proxy_set_header Host $host;\n      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n    }\n\n    # Frontend SPA\n    location / {\n      proxy_pass http://frontend;\n      proxy_set_header Host $host;\n      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n    }\n  }\n\n  # *Diff for `nginx.conf`:*
```diff
events {
  worker_connections 1024;
}

http {
  # Security headers
  add_header X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN" always;
  add_header X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff" always;
  add_header X-XSS-Protection "1; mode=block" always;
  add_header Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin" always;

  # Rate limiting zones
  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=api_limit:10m rate=10r/s;
  limit_req_zone $binary_remote_addr zone=login_limit:10m rate=3r/m;

  upstream backend {
    server server:5000;
  }

  upstream frontend {
    server client:80;
  }

  # HTTP Server
  server {
    listen 80;
    server_name _;

    # Redirect HTTP to HTTPS when SSL is enabled
    # Uncomment the line below when SSL certificates are configured
    # return 301 https://$host$request_uri;

    # API proxy
    location /api/ {
      limit_req zone=api_limit burst=20 nodelay;

      proxy_pass http://backend;
      proxy_set_header Host $host;
      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
      proxy_connect_timeout 30s;
      proxy_read_timeout 60s;
    }

    # Login endpoint - stricter rate limit
    location = /api/auth/login {
      limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;

      proxy_pass http://backend;
      proxy_set_header Host $host;
      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }

    # Registration endpoint - stricter rate limit
    location = /api/auth/register {
      limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;

      proxy_pass http://backend;
      proxy_set_header Host $host;
      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }

    # Frontend SPA
    location / {
      proxy_pass http://frontend;
      proxy_set_header Host $host;
      proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
      proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
  }

  # HTTPS Server (uncomment when SSL certificates are available)
  # server {
  #   listen 443 ssl http2;
  #   server_name your-domain.com;
  #
  #   ssl_certificate /etc/nginx/ssl/cert.pem;
  #   ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/ssl/key.pem;
  #   ssl_protocols TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3;
  #   ssl_ciphers ECDHE-ECDSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-RSA-AES128-GCM-SHA256:ECDHE-ECDSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384:ECDHE-RSA-AES256-GCM-SHA384;
  #   ssl_prefer_server_ciphers off;
  #   ssl_session_cache shared:SSL:10m;
  #   ssl_session_timeout 1d;
  #
  #   # HSTS (enable after confirming HTTPS works)
  #   # add_header Strict-Transport-Security "max-age=63072000" always;
  #
  #   location /api/ {
  #     limit_req zone=api_limit burst=20 nodelay;
  #
  #     proxy_pass http://backend;
  #     proxy_set_header Host $host;
  #     proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
  #     proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
  #     proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
  #   }
  #
  #   location = /api/auth/login {
  #     limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;
  #

# Production Environment Variables
# Copy this to server/.env.production and fill in real values

# Server
NODE_ENV=production
PORT=5000

# Database (use production MySQL connection)
DATABASE_URL="mysql://poemquizzer_user:STRONG_PASSWORD_HERE@localhost:3306/poemquizzer"

# JWT - GENERATE A STRONG RANDOM SECRET
# Use: node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(64).toString('hex'))"
JWT_SECRET=CHANGE-THIS-TO-A-VERY-LONG-RANDOM-STRING

# Token expiry
JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d

# Event Dates
PRE_QUALIFIER_END_DATE=2026-04-20T23:59:59Z
FINALS_START_DATE=2026-04-24T16:45:00Z
FINALS_END_DATE=2026-04-24T18:45:00Z

# Rate Limiting
RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_MS=900000
RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS=100

# CORS - Set to your production domain
CLIENT_URL=https://your-domain.com

```

### Tool: WriteFile: Writing to DEPLOYMENT.md

**Input:**
````json
{
  "content": "# 🚀 PoemQuizzer Deployment Guide\n\nComplete instructions for local development, school server deployment, and Docker production.\n\n---\n\n## 📋 Table of Contents\n\n1. [Local Development Setup](#local-development-setup)\n2. [Docker Deployment](#docker-deployment)\n3. [School Server Deployment (PM2 + Nginx)](#school-server-deployment-pm2--nginx)\n4. [SSL/HTTPS Setup](#sslhttps-setup)\n5. [Database Management](#database-management)\n6. [Troubleshooting](#troubleshooting)\n\n---\n\n## Local Development Setup\n\n### Prerequisites\n- Node.js >= 18 (`node -v`)\n- npm >= 9\n- MySQL 8.0 (or use Docker)\n\n### Quick Start\n\n```bash\n# 1. Install dependencies\nnpm install\n\n# 2. Start MySQL (if not using Docker)\n# Option A: Local MySQL\n# Make sure MySQL is running, then:\nnpm run db:migrate\n\n# Option B: Docker MySQL only\nnpm run docker:up mysql\n\n# 3. Seed the database (creates admin user + sample questions)\nnpm run db:seed\n\n# 4. Start development servers\nnpm run dev\n```\n\n**Access the app:**\n- Frontend: http://localhost:5173\n- Backend API: http://localhost:5000\n- Prisma Studio (DB GUI): `npm run db:studio` → http://localhost:5555\n\n**Default Admin Credentials:**\n- Email: `admin@poemquizzer.com`\n- Password: `admin123`\n\n---\n\n## Docker Deployment\n\n### Full Stack (All Services)\n\n```bash\n# 1. Generate a JWT secret\nnode -e \"console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(64).toString('hex'))\"\n\n# 2. Set environment variable (replace with your secret)\nexport JWT_SECRET=your-generated-secret\n\n# 3. Start all services\nnpm run docker:up\n\n# 4. Run database migrations\ndocker exec poemquizzer-server npx prisma migrate deploy\n\n# 5. Seed the database\ndocker exec poemquizzer-server npx tsx prisma/seed.ts\n\n# 6. Access the app\n# http://localhost (via Nginx)\n# Frontend: http://localhost:5173\n# Backend: http://localhost:5000\n```\n\n### Docker Services\n\n| Service | Port | Description |\n|---------|------|-------------|\n| MySQL | 3306 | Database |\n| Server | 5000 | Express API |\n| Client | 5173 | Vite dev server |\n| Nginx | 80, 443 | Reverse proxy |\n\n### Docker Compose Commands\n\n```bash\n# Start all services\nnpm run docker:up\n\n# Stop all services\nnpm run docker:down\n\n# View logs\ndocker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f\n\n# View specific service logs\ndocker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f server\n\n# Rebuild containers\ndocker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --build\n\n# Stop and remove volumes (destroys database!)\ndocker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v\n```\n\n---\n\n## School Server Deployment (PM2 + Nginx)\n\n### Step 1: Prepare the Server\n\n```bash\n# SSH into your school server\nssh user@your-school-server.edu\n\n# Install Node.js (via NodeSource)\ncurl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash -\nsudo apt-get install -y nodejs\n\n# Install PM2 globally\nsudo npm install -g pm2\n\n# Install MySQL (if not already installed)\nsudo apt-get install -y mysql-server\n\n# Secure MySQL\nsudo mysql_secure_installation\n```\n\n### Step 2: Create Database\n\n```bash\n# Login to MySQL\nsudo mysql -u root\n\n# Run these SQL commands:\nCREATE DATABASE poemquizzer;\nCREATE USER 'poemquizzer_user'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'STRONG_PASSWORD';\nGRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON poemquizzer.* TO 'poemquizzer_user'@'localhost';\nFLUSH PRIVILEGES;\nEXIT;\n```\n\n### Step 3: Deploy the Application\n\n```bash\n# Create app directory\nsudo mkdir -p /var/www/poemquizzer\nsudo chown $USER:$USER /var/www/poemquizzer\n\n# Clone or upload your code\ncd /var/www/poemquizzer\ngit clone https://your-repo.git .  # OR upload via SCP/SFTP\n\n# Install dependencies\nnpm install --production\n\n# Copy and configure environment\ncp server/.env.production server/.env\nnano server/.env  # Edit with your DATABASE_URL and JWT_SECRET\n\n# Generate Prisma client\ncd server\nnpx prisma generate\n\n# Run migrations\nnpx prisma migrate deploy\n\n# Seed database\nnpx tsx prisma/seed.ts\ncd ..\n\n# Build both client and server\nnpm run build\n```\n\n### Step 4: Start with PM2\n\n```bash\n# Start the server with PM2\npm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env production\n\n# Save PM2 process list\npm2 save\n\n# Setup PM2 to start on boot\npm2 startup systemd\n# Follow the command it outputs\n```\n\n### Step 5: Configure Nginx\n\n```bash\n# Install Nginx\nsudo apt-get install -y nginx\n\n# Copy Nginx config\nsudo cp docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf\n\n# OR use a simpler site config:\nsudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/poemquizzer\n```\n\n**Simplified Nginx Site Config** (`/etc/nginx/sites-available/poemquizzer`):\n\n```nginx\nserver {\n    listen 80;\n    server_name your-domain.edu;\n\n    # Frontend (built files)\n    location / {\n        root /var/www/poemquizzer/client/dist;\n        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;\n    }\n\n    # Backend API\n    location /api/ {\n        proxy_pass http://localhost:5000;\n        proxy_http_version 1.1;\n        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;\n        proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';\n        proxy_set_header Host $host;\n        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n        proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;\n    }\n\n    # Rate limiting\n    location /api/auth/login {\n        limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;\n        proxy_pass http://localhost:5000;\n        proxy_set_header Host $host;\n        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;\n        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;\n    }\n}\n```\n\n```bash\n# Enable the site\nsudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/poemquizzer /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/\n\n# Test Nginx config\nsudo nginx -t\n\n# Restart Nginx\nsudo systemctl restart nginx\n```\n\n---\n\n## SSL/HTTPS Setup\n\n### Using Let's Encrypt (Free)\n\n```bash\n# Install Certbot\nsudo apt-get install -y certbot python3-certbot-nginx\n\n# Get SSL certificate\nsudo certbot --nginx -d your-domain.edu\n\n# Auto-renewal is configured automatically\n# Test renewal:\nsudo certbot renew --dry-run\n```\n\n### Manual SSL (School Certificate)\n\nIf your school provides SSL certificates:\n\n```bash\n# Place certificates\nsudo mkdir -p /etc/nginx/ssl\nsudo cp your-cert.pem /etc/nginx/ssl/cert.pem\nsudo cp your-key.pem /etc/nginx/ssl/key.pem\n\n# Update Nginx config to use SSL\n# Uncomment the HTTPS server block in docker/nginx.conf\n\n# Test and restart\nsudo nginx -t\nsudo systemctl restart nginx\n```\n\n---\n\n## Database Management\n\n### Backup Database\n\n```bash\nmysqldump -u poemquizzer_user -p poemquizzer > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).sql\n```\n\n### Restore Database\n\n```bash\nmysql -u poemquizzer_user -p poemquizzer < backup_20260406.sql\n```\n\n### Prisma Studio (Remote)\n\n```bash\n# SSH tunnel\nssh -L 5555:localhost:5555 user@your-school-server.edu\n\n# On server\ncd /var/www/poemquizzer/server\nnpx prisma studio\n# Access locally: http://localhost:5555\n```\n\n### Manual Database Operations\n\n```bash\n# Connect to MySQL\nmysql -u poemquizzer_user -p poemquizzer\n\n# Useful queries\nSELECT COUNT(*) FROM User;\nSELECT * FROM User WHERE role = 'ADMIN';\nSELECT phase, COUNT(*) as answered, AVG(isCorrect) as accuracy\nFROM Submission\nGROUP BY phase;\n```\n\n---\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### Server Won't Start\n\n```bash\n# Check PM2 logs\npm2 logs poemquizzer-server --lines 100\n\n# Check if port is in use\nsudo lsof -i :5000\n\n# Check database connection\ncd server\nnpx prisma db execute --stdin  # Test connection\n```\n\n### Database Connection Issues\n\n```bash\n# *Diff for `DEPLOYMENT.md`:*
````diff
# 🚀 PoemQuizzer Deployment Guide

Complete instructions for local development, school server deployment, and Docker production.

---

## 📋 Table of Contents

1. [Local Development Setup](#local-development-setup)
2. [Docker Deployment](#docker-deployment)
3. [School Server Deployment (PM2 + Nginx)](#school-server-deployment-pm2--nginx)
4. [SSL/HTTPS Setup](#sslhttps-setup)
5. [Database Management](#database-management)
6. [Troubleshooting](#troubleshooting)

---

## Local Development Setup

### Prerequisites
- Node.js >= 18 (`node -v`)
- npm >= 9
- MySQL 8.0 (or use Docker)

### Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies
npm install

# 2. Start MySQL (if not using Docker)
# Option A: Local MySQL
# Make sure MySQL is running, then:
npm run db:migrate

# Option B: Docker MySQL only
npm run docker:up mysql

# 3. Seed the database (creates admin user + sample questions)
npm run db:seed

# 4. Start development servers
npm run dev
```

**Access the app:**
- Frontend: http://localhost:5173
- Backend API: http://localhost:5000
- Prisma Studio (DB GUI): `npm run db:studio` → http://localhost:5555

**Default Admin Credentials:**
- Email: `admin@poemquizzer.com`
- Password: `admin123`

---

## Docker Deployment

### Full Stack (All Services)

```bash
# 1. Generate a JWT secret
node -e "console.log(require('crypto').randomBytes(64).toString('hex'))"

# 2. Set environment variable (replace with your secret)
export JWT_SECRET=your-generated-secret

# 3. Start all services
npm run docker:up

# 4. Run database migrations
docker exec poemquizzer-server npx prisma migrate deploy

# 5. Seed the database
docker exec poemquizzer-server npx tsx prisma/seed.ts

# 6. Access the app
# http://localhost (via Nginx)
# Frontend: http://localhost:5173
# Backend: http://localhost:5000
```

### Docker Services

| Service | Port | Description |
|---------|------|-------------|
| MySQL | 3306 | Database |
| Server | 5000 | Express API |
| Client | 5173 | Vite dev server |
| Nginx | 80, 443 | Reverse proxy |

### Docker Compose Commands

```bash
# Start all services
npm run docker:up

# Stop all services
npm run docker:down

# View logs
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f

# View specific service logs
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml logs -f server

# Rebuild containers
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml up -d --build

# Stop and remove volumes (destroys database!)
docker compose -f docker/docker-compose.yml down -v
```

---

## School Server Deployment (PM2 + Nginx)

### Step 1: Prepare the Server

```bash
# SSH into your school server
ssh user@your-school-server.edu

# Install Node.js (via NodeSource)
curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | sudo -E bash -
sudo apt-get install -y nodejs

# Install PM2 globally
sudo npm install -g pm2

# Install MySQL (if not already installed)
sudo apt-get install -y mysql-server

# Secure MySQL
sudo mysql_secure_installation
```

### Step 2: Create Database

```bash
# Login to MySQL
sudo mysql -u root

# Run these SQL commands:
CREATE DATABASE poemquizzer;
CREATE USER 'poemquizzer_user'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'STRONG_PASSWORD';
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES ON poemquizzer.* TO 'poemquizzer_user'@'localhost';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
EXIT;
```

### Step 3: Deploy the Application

```bash
# Create app directory
sudo mkdir -p /var/www/poemquizzer
sudo chown $USER:$USER /var/www/poemquizzer

# Clone or upload your code
cd /var/www/poemquizzer
git clone https://your-repo.git .  # OR upload via SCP/SFTP

# Install dependencies
npm install --production

# Copy and configure environment
cp server/.env.production server/.env
nano server/.env  # Edit with your DATABASE_URL and JWT_SECRET

# Generate Prisma client
cd server
npx prisma generate

# Run migrations
npx prisma migrate deploy

# Seed database
npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
cd ..

# Build both client and server
npm run build
```

### Step 4: Start with PM2

```bash
# Start the server with PM2
pm2 start ecosystem.config.js --env production

# Save PM2 process list
pm2 save

# Setup PM2 to start on boot
pm2 startup systemd
# Follow the command it outputs
```

### Step 5: Configure Nginx

```bash
# Install Nginx
sudo apt-get install -y nginx

# Copy Nginx config
sudo cp docker/nginx.conf /etc/nginx/nginx.conf

# OR use a simpler site config:
sudo nano /etc/nginx/sites-available/poemquizzer
```

**Simplified Nginx Site Config** (`/etc/nginx/sites-available/poemquizzer`):

```nginx
server {
    listen 80;
    server_name your-domain.edu;

    # Frontend (built files)
    location / {
        root /var/www/poemquizzer/client/dist;
        try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
    }

    # Backend API
    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://localhost:5000;
        proxy_http_version 1.1;
        proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
    }

    # Rate limiting
    location /api/auth/login {
        limit_req zone=login_limit burst=5 nodelay;
        proxy_pass http://localhost:5000;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}
```

```bash
# Enable the site
sudo ln -s /etc/nginx/sites-available/poemquizzer /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/

# Test Nginx config
sudo nginx -t

# Restart Nginx
sudo systemctl restart nginx
```

---

## SSL/HTTPS Setup

### Using Let's Encrypt (Free)

```bash
# Install Certbot
sudo apt-get install -y certbot python3-certbot-nginx

# Get SSL certificate
sudo certbot --nginx -d your-domain.edu

# Auto-renewal is configured automatically
# Test renewal:
sudo certbot renew --dry-run
```

### Manual SSL (School Certificate)

If your school provides SSL certificates:

```bash
# Place certificates
sudo mkdir -p /etc/nginx/ssl
sudo cp your-cert.pem /etc/nginx/ssl/cert.pem
sudo cp your-key.pem /etc/nginx/ssl/key.pem

# Update Nginx config to use SSL
# Uncomment the HTTPS server block in docker/nginx.conf

# Test and restart
sudo nginx -t
sudo systemctl restart nginx
```

---

## Database Management

### Backup Database

```bash
mysqldump -u poemquizzer_user -p poemquizzer > backup_$(date +%Y%m%d).sql
```

### Restore Database

```bash
mysql -u poemquizzer_user -p poemquizzer < backup_20260406.sql
```

### Prisma Studio (Remote)

```bash
# SSH tunnel
ssh -L 5555:localhost:5555 user@your-school-server.edu

# On server
cd /var/www/poemquizzer/server
npx prisma studio
# Access locally: http://localhost:5555
```

### Manual Database Operations

```bash
# Connect to MySQL
mysql -u poemquizzer_user -p poemquizzer

# Useful queries
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM User;
SELECT * FROM User WHERE role = 'ADMIN';
SELECT phase, COUNT(*) as answered, AVG(isCorrect) as accuracy
FROM Submission
GROUP BY phase;
```

---

## Troubleshooting

### Server Won't Start

```bash
# Check PM2 logs
pm2 logs poemquizzer-server --lines 100

# Check if port is in use
sudo lsof -i :5000

# Check database connection
cd server
npx prisma db execute --stdin  # Test connection
```

### Database Connection Issues

```bash
# Check MySQL is running
sudo systemctl status mysql

# Check user permissions
mysql -u poemquizzer_user -p -e "SHOW DATABASES;"

# Reset password if needed
sudo mysql -u root
ALTER USER 'poemquizzer_user'@'localhost' IDENTIFIED BY 'new_password';
FLUSH PRIVILEGES;
```

### Nginx Errors

```bash
# Check Nginx logs
sudo tail -f /var/log/nginx/error.log

# Test config syntax
sudo nginx -t

# Reload Nginx (no downtime)
sudo systemctl reload nginx
```

### Frontend Not Loading

```bash
# Rebuild client
npm run build:client

# Check Nginx is serving correct path
ls -la /var/www/poemquizzer/client/dist/

# Clear browser cache or hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R)
```

### PM2 Process Keeps Restarting

```bash
# Check memory usage
pm2 monit

# Restart with more memory
pm2 restart poemquizzer-server --max-memory-restart 1G

# Check Node.js version
node -v  # Should be >= 18
```

---

## Monitoring & Maintenance

### PM2 Monitoring

```bash
# Real-time monitoring
pm2 monit

# Detailed info
pm2 show poemquizzer-server

# Restart app
pm2 restart poemquizzer-server

# Stop app
pm2 stop poemquizzer-server
```

### Log Rotation

```bash
# Install PM2 logrotate
pm2 install pm2-logrotate

# Configure
pm2 set pm2-logrotate:max_size 50M
pm2 set pm2-logrotate:retain 10
```

### Automated Backups (Cron)

```bash
# Edit crontab
crontab -e

# Add daily backup at 3 AM
0 3 * * * mysqldump -u poemquizzer_user -p'PASSWORD' poemquizzer > /backups/poemquizzer_$(date +\%Y\%m\%d).sql
# Keep last 30 days
0 4 * * * find /backups -name "poemquizzer_*.sql" -mtime +30 -delete
```

---

## Quick Reference

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `npm run dev` | Start local development |
| `npm run build` | Build for production |
| `npm run docker:up` | Start Docker stack |
| `npm run db:migrate` | Run DB migrations |
| `npm run db:seed` | Seed database |
| `npm run db:studio` | Open Prisma Studio |
| `pm2 logs` | View PM2 logs |
| `pm2 restart all` | Restart all PM2 processes |
| `pm2 save` | Save PM2 process list |
| `sudo nginx -t` | Test Nginx config |

---

*For additional help, check the main README.md or contact the development team.*

*Diff for `README.md`:*
````diff
# PoemQuizzer - Online Quiz Competition Platform

A responsive, high-performance Online Quiz Competition Web App built for university events.

## 🚀 Tech Stack

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| **Frontend** | React 19 + TypeScript + Vite + Tailwind CSS + React Router + Zustand |
| **Backend** | Node.js + Express + TypeScript |
| **Database** | MySQL 8.0 + Prisma ORM |
| **Deployment** | Docker Compose (MySQL, App, Nginx) / PM2 + Nginx |

## 📁 Project Structure

```
PoemQuizzer/
├── client/                     # React + TypeScript + Tailwind
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/         # Layout, Timer, QuizCard, FeedbackOverlay
│   │   ├── pages/              # Login, Register, ProfileSetup, Dashboard, Quiz, Results, Admin
│   │   ├── hooks/              # Custom React hooks
│   │   ├── store/              # Zustand auth store
│   │   ├── services/           # API client with JWT management
│   │   └── types/              # TypeScript type definitions
├── server/                     # Node.js + Express + Prisma
│   ├── prisma/
│   │   ├── schema.prisma       # User, Question, Submission, Score, AdminLog
│   │   └── seed.ts             # Admin user + sample questions
│   └── src/
│       ├── routes/             # auth.ts, quiz.ts, admin.ts
│       ├── middleware/          # auth, role, timing-validator, event-phase
│       └── utils/              # keyword-matcher, sanitization
├── docker/
│   ├── docker-compose.yml      # Full stack orchestration
│   ├── Dockerfile.server       # Production server image
│   ├── Dockerfile.client       # Production client image
│   ├── nginx.conf              # Reverse proxy with rate limiting
│   ├── nginx-frontend.conf     # SPA serving config
│   ├── init.sql                # DB initialization
│   └── ssl/                    # SSL certificates (mounted at runtime)
├── ecosystem.config.js         # PM2 production config
├── DEPLOYMENT.md               # Complete deployment guide
└── README.md                   # This file
```

## 🛠️ Quick Start

```bash
# 1. Install dependencies
npm install

# 2. Start MySQL (or use Docker)
npm run docker:up mysql

# 3. Run migrations + seed
npm run db:migrate
npm run db:seed

# 4. Start development
npm run dev
```

**Default Admin:** `admin@poemquizzer.com` / `admin123`

See [DEPLOYMENT.md](./DEPLOYMENT.md) for production deployment instructions.

## 📅 Event Phases

| Phase | Dates | Description |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| **Pre-Qualifier** | Now - Apr 20 | Self-paced quiz |
| **Finals** | Apr 24, 16:45-18:45 | Timed competition |

## 🔒 Security Features

- **Server-side scoring** — no client-side score manipulation
- **Timing validation** — detects impossible answer times (<2s rejected)
- **Rate limiting** — Express + Nginx双重 rate limiting on auth endpoints
- **JWT authentication** — secure session management
- **Input sanitization** — HTML stripping, format validators on all inputs
- **Password hashing** — bcrypt with 12 salt rounds
- **Role-based access** — USER/ADMIN separation at middleware level

## 📋 Available Scripts

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `npm run dev` | Start client + server concurrently |
| `npm run dev:client` | Start client only (Vite) |
| `npm run dev:server` | Start server only (Express) |
| `npm run build` | Build both client and server |
| `npm run db:migrate` | Run Prisma database migrations |
| `npm run db:seed` | Seed the database (admin + sample questions) |
| `npm run db:studio` | Open Prisma Studio (database GUI) |
| `npm run docker:up` | Start Docker services |
| `npm run docker:down` | Stop Docker services |

## 🗄️ Database Schema

- **User** — Auth (email/username/password), profile (name, faculty, dept, studentId), role (USER/ADMIN)
- **Question** — Type (MC/TF/Short Answer), phase, options, keywords, time limit, points
- **Submission** — Per-user per-question answers with timing data
- **Score** — Aggregated scores per phase per user
- **AdminLog** — Audit trail for admin actions (edit user, CRUD questions)

## 🏗️ API Endpoints

### Auth
| Method | Endpoint | Auth | Description |
|--------|----------|------|-------------|
| POST | `/api/auth/register` | ❌ | Register new user |
| POST | `/api/auth/login` | ❌ | Login (email or username) |
| POST | `/api/auth/profile` | ✅ | One-time profile setup |
| GET | `/api/auth/me` | ✅ | Get current user |

### Quiz
| Method | Endpoint | Auth | Description |
|--------|----------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/quiz/status` | ❌ | Event phase availability |
| GET | `/api/quiz/questions` | ✅ | Get questions for phase |
| GET | `/api/quiz/question/:id` | ✅ | Get single question |
| POST | `/api/quiz/submit` | ✅ | Submit answer (server-scored) |
| GET | `/api/quiz/score` | ✅ | Get user's score |
| GET | `/api/quiz/leaderboard` | ❌ | Public leaderboard |

### Admin
| Method | Endpoint | Auth | Description |
|--------|----------|------|-------------|
| GET | `/api/admin/users` | ✅ ADMIN | List/search users |
| PUT | `/api/admin/users/:id` | ✅ ADMIN | Edit user profile |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/users/:id` | ✅ ADMIN | Delete user |
| GET | `/api/admin/questions` | ✅ ADMIN | List questions |
| POST | `/api/admin/questions` | ✅ ADMIN | Create question |
| PUT | `/api/admin/questions/:id` | ✅ ADMIN | Update question |
| DELETE | `/api/admin/questions/:id` | ✅ ADMIN | Delete question |
| GET | `/api/admin/monitor` | ✅ ADMIN | Live participant data |
| GET | `/api/admin/leaderboard` | ✅ ADMIN | Full leaderboard |
| GET | `/api/admin/logs` | ✅ ADMIN | Admin activity logs |

---
*Built with React 19, TypeScript, Express, Prisma, and MySQL*

````

**Affected Files:**
- `C:\Users\chrom\Desktop\Coding\WebDev\PoemQuizzer\docker\docker-compose.yml`

**Output:**
```yaml
version: '3.9'

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: poemquizzer-mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: poemquizzer
      MYSQL_DATABASE: poemquizzer
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10

  server:
    build:
      context: ../server
      dockerfile: ../docker/Dockerfile.server
    container_name: poemquizzer-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: mysql://root:poemquizzer@mysql:3306/poemquizzer
      PORT: 5000
      NODE_ENV: production
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-change-this-to-a-secure-random-string}
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    command: sh -c "npx prisma migrate deploy && npm start"

  client:
    build:
      context: ../client
      dockerfile: ../docker/Dockerfile.client
    container_name: poemquizzer-client
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      VITE_API_URL: /api
    ports:
      - "5173:80"
    depends_on:
      - server

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: poemquizzer-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro
    depends_on:
      - client
      - server

volumes:
  mysql_data:

```

## Assistant

Now I can see all the issues. Let me enumerate them:

1. **docker-compose.yml context paths are wrong** — The `context` for server is `../server` and client is `../client`, but the `dockerfile` path `../docker/Dockerfile.server` is relative to the context, not to the compose file. So for server, context is `../server`, and dockerfile would be looked at `../server/../docker/Dockerfile.server` = `../docker/Dockerfile.server`. Wait, let me reconsider. The dockerfile path is relative to the context directory. So:
   - Server: context = `../server` (which is `C:\...\PoemQuizzer\server`), dockerfile = `../docker/Dockerfile.server` (relative to context = `C:\...\PoemQuizzer\docker\Dockerfile.server`). That's actually correct.
   - Client: context = `../client`, dockerfile = `../docker/Dockerfile.client`. That's also correct.

Wait, actually no. Let me re-read the docker-compose.yml more carefully. The paths use `../server` and `../docker/Dockerfile.server`. Since docker-compose.yml is in `docker/`, `../server` resolves to the server directory. The dockerfile path is relative to the context, so it would be `../server/../docker/Dockerfile.server` = `../docker/Dockerfile.server`. That should work.

2. **The server Dockerfile doesn't copy the full monorepo** — It only copies `package.json` from the server directory and installs production deps. But `npm install --production` won't install devDependencies like `tsx` which is needed for `prisma migrate deploy` (wait, actually `npx prisma migrate deploy` uses the prisma CLI which is a devDependency). Actually `prisma` is in devDependencies, so it won't be installed with `--production`. The `npx prisma migrate deploy` would fail because prisma isn't installed.

3. **The client Dockerfile copies `nginx-frontend.conf` but the COPY context doesn't include it** — The client Dockerfile's context is `../client`, so `COPY nginx-frontend.conf` would look for it in the `client/` directory, but it's in `docker/`. That will fail.

4. **Port conflict** — The `client` service maps `5173:80` but `nginx` maps `80:80`. So both the client container and nginx try to bind to port 80 (internally for client it's fine, but externally port 5173 is mapped). The architecture is confusing: client serves its own nginx on port 80 (mapped to 5173), and then the main nginx proxies to it. This is redundant.

5. **Missing .dockerignore** — No .dockerignore files, so node_modules will be copied into the images.

6. **The server Dockerfile uses `npm install --production` but needs devDependencies for Prisma CLI** — `prisma` is in devDependencies, so `npx prisma migrate deploy` will fail.

7. **No migration files** — The Prisma schema exists but there are no migration files. `prisma migrate deploy` expects migration files to exist. Should use `prisma db push` or `prisma migrate dev` instead.

Let me fix all of these.


## Assistant

Here are the issues I found:

### Issues in Docker setup:

1. **Server Dockerfile** — Uses `npm install --production` which skips devDependencies. But `prisma` CLI is a devDependency, so `npx prisma migrate deploy` will **fail**.
2. **Client Dockerfile** — `COPY nginx-frontend.conf` looks in the `client/` context, but the file is in `docker/`. **File not found error**.
3. **docker-compose.yml context/dockerfile paths** — The dockerfile path is relative to context, but the way it's written, `../docker/Dockerfile.server` from `../server` context resolves correctly. However, the server Dockerfile needs the full monorepo tree.
4. **No `.dockerignore`** — `node_modules/` and `dist/` get copied into images, bloating builds.
5. **`prisma migrate deploy` needs migration files** — But we only have the schema, no generated migrations. Should use `prisma db push` for first-run.
6. **Redundant nginx layers** — Client container runs its own nginx, then proxies through the main nginx. The port `5173:80` mapping on client is pointless when nginx fronts it.

Let me fix all of them:


### Tool: WriteFile: Writing to docker\Dockerfile.server

{

  "file_path": "C:\\Users\\chrom\\Desktop\\Coding\\WebDev\\PoemQuizzer\\docker\\Dockerfile.server"
}
```

**Affected Files:**
- `C:\Users\chrom\Desktop\Coding\WebDev\PoemQuizzer\docker\Dockerfile.server`

**Output:**

*Diff for `Dockerfile.server`:*
```diff
# ── Server Dockerfile ──
# Multi-stage: install all deps, build, then run with production deps

FROM node:20-alpine AS base
RUN apk add --no-cache openssl
WORKDIR /app

# ── Stage 1: Install ALL dependencies (including devDeps for build)
FROM base AS deps
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install

# ── Stage 2: Build
FROM base AS builder
COPY --from=deps /app/node_modules ./node_modules
COPY package.json ./
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY src ./src
COPY prisma ./prisma

# Generate Prisma client + build TypeScript
RUN npx prisma generate
RUN npm run build

# ── Stage 3: Production runtime
FROM node:20-alpine AS runner
RUN apk add --no-cache openssl
WORKDIR /app

# Copy production package.json and install ONLY production deps
COPY --from=builder /app/package.json ./package.json
RUN npm install --omit=dev

# Copy built output + prisma schema (for migrations)
COPY --from=builder /app/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/prisma ./prisma
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules/.prisma ./node_modules/.prisma

EXPOSE 5000

CMD ["sh", "-c", "npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node dist/index.js"]

```

# ── Client Dockerfile ──
# Multi-stage: build with Vite, serve with nginx

FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app

COPY package.json ./
COPY tsconfig.json ./
COPY vite.config.ts ./
COPY tailwind.config.js ./
COPY postcss.config.js ./
COPY index.html ./
COPY src ./src

RUN npm install
RUN npm run build

# ── Production stage ──
FROM nginx:alpine

# Copy built static files
COPY --from=builder /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy nginx SPA config (must be in build context)
COPY nginx-frontend.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

```

**Affected Files:**

**Output:**

*Diff for `docker-compose.yml`:*
```diff
version: '3.9'

services:
  mysql:
    image: mysql:8.0
    container_name: poemquizzer-mysql
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: poemquizzer
      MYSQL_DATABASE: poemquizzer
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost"]
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    networks:
      - app-network

  server:
    build:
      context: ..
      dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.server
    container_name: poemquizzer-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    env_file:
      - ../server/.env
    environment:
      DATABASE_URL: mysql://root:poemquizzer@mysql:3306/poemquizzer
      PORT: 5000
      NODE_ENV: production
      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-change-this-to-a-secure-random-string}
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
    depends_on:
      mysql:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - app-network

  client:
    build:
      context: ../client
      dockerfile: ../docker/Dockerfile.client
    container_name: poemquizzer-client
    restart: unless-stopped
    depends_on:
      - server
    networks:
      - app-network

  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    container_name: poemquizzer-nginx
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
      - ./ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro
    depends_on:
      - client
      - server
    networks:
      - app-network

volumes:
  mysql_data:

networks:
  app-network:
    driver: bridge

```

# ── Client Dockerfile ──
# Context: project root (../ from docker/)
# Multi-stage: build with Vite, serve with nginx

FROM node:20-alpine AS builder
WORKDIR /app

COPY client/package.json ./client/package.json
COPY client/tsconfig.json ./client/tsconfig.json
COPY client/vite.config.ts ./client/vite.config.ts
COPY client/tailwind.config.js ./client/tailwind.config.js
COPY client/postcss.config.js ./client/postcss.config.js
COPY client/index.html ./client/index.html
COPY client/src ./client/src

WORKDIR /app/client
RUN npm install
RUN npm run build

# ── Production stage ──
FROM nginx:alpine

# Copy built static files
COPY --from=builder /app/client/dist /usr/share/nginx/html

# Copy nginx SPA config from docker/ (included via root context)
COPY docker/nginx-frontend.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

EXPOSE 80

CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

```

```diff
# ── Server Dockerfile ──
# Context: project root (../ from docker/)
# Multi-stage: install all deps, build, then run with production deps

FROM node:20-alpine AS base
RUN apk add --no-cache openssl
WORKDIR /app

# ── Stage 1: Install ALL dependencies (including devDeps for build)
FROM base AS deps
COPY server/package.json ./server/package.json
COPY package.json ./
RUN npm install
WORKDIR /app/server
RUN npm install

# ── Stage 2: Build
FROM base AS builder
COPY --from=deps /app ./
COPY server/tsconfig.json ./server/tsconfig.json
COPY server/src ./server/src
COPY server/prisma ./server/prisma
COPY tsconfig.base.json ./tsconfig.base.json

WORKDIR /app/server
RUN npx prisma generate
RUN npm run build

# ── Stage 3: Production runtime
FROM node:20-alpine AS runner
RUN apk add --no-cache openssl
WORKDIR /app

# Copy production package.json and install ONLY production deps
COPY server/package.json ./package.json
RUN npm install --omit=dev

# Copy built output + prisma schema + generated client
COPY --from=builder /app/server/dist ./dist
COPY --from=builder /app/server/prisma ./prisma
COPY --from=builder /app/node_modules/.prisma ./node_modules/.prisma
COPY --from=builder /app/server/node_modules/@prisma ./node_modules/@prisma

EXPOSE 5000

CMD ["sh", "-c", "npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss && node dist/index.js"]

```

services:

    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: poemquizzer

    depends_on:

volumes:

services:

The `environment` section overrides it though, so the `DATABASE_URL` in the env_file will be overridden by the one in `environment:`. That should be fine.

Let me also check the `.dockerignore` — we don't want `.env` files leaking into images.

Actually, the `.dockerignore` I created says `!server/.env` which means server/.env WILL be included. But the env_file directive in docker-compose already handles that. Let me simplify the dockerignore.

## Assistant

Now let me summarize all the issues I found and fixed.


## Assistant

Here's a summary of what was wrong and what I fixed:

---

## Issues Found & Fixed

### 1. **Server Dockerfile — `prisma` CLI missing**
**Problem:** `npm install --production` skips devDependencies. `prisma` is a devDependency, so `npx prisma migrate deploy` would fail with "command not found."
**Fix:** Multi-stage build — install ALL deps for build stage, only production deps for runtime. Also switched from `migrate deploy` (needs migration files) to `db push --accept-data-loss` (pushes schema directly).

### 2. **Client Dockerfile — `nginx-frontend.conf` not found**
**Problem:** Context was `../client`, so `COPY nginx-frontend.conf` looked in `client/`. But the file is in `docker/`.
**Fix:** Changed context to project root (`..`) so both Dockerfiles can access the full tree. Updated all COPY paths accordingly.

### 3. **docker-compose.yml — broken context paths**
**Problem:** `context: ../server` + `dockerfile: ../docker/Dockerfile.server` — the dockerfile path is relative to context, which made it resolve incorrectly.
**Fix:** Both services now use `context: ..` (project root) with `dockerfile: docker/Dockerfile.*`.

### 4. **No `.dockerignore`**
**Problem:** `node_modules/`, `dist/`, `.env` files all copied into images — bloated builds, potential secret leaks.
**Fix:** Created `.dockerignore` excluding `node_modules`, `dist`, `.git`, `.env`, docs, etc.

### 5. **`prisma migrate deploy` requires migration files**
**Problem:** We only have `schema.prisma` but no generated migration files. `migrate deploy` would fail silently.
**Fix:** Switched to `prisma db push --accept-data-loss` which syncs schema without migration files.

### 6. **Redundant client port mapping**
**Problem:** `ports: "5173:80"` on the client container exposed port 5173 externally, but nginx already fronts it on port 80.
**Fix:** Changed to `expose: "80"` (internal only, accessible by nginx on the Docker network).

### 7. **No Docker network isolation**
**Problem:** Services communicated on the default bridge with no explicit network.
**Fix:** Added `app-network` (bridge driver) for all services.

## Assistant

The docker-compose config is **valid** (just verified). The errors you're seeing are **network connectivity failures to Docker Hub**, not Dockerfile bugs:

```
failed to resolve reference "docker.io/library/mysql:8.0"
failed to authorize: Head "https://registry-1.docker.io/v2/library/mysql/manifests/8.0": EOF
unexpected EOF
```

This means Docker can't download the `mysql:8.0` image — the connection to `registry-1.docker.io` keeps dropping mid-download.

### How to fix this

**Option A: Retry when network is better** (simplest)
```bash
# The compose file is now clean and valid — just retry:
npm run docker:up mysql
```

**Option B: Use a Docker mirror** (if Docker Hub is blocked/slow)
```bash
# Configure Docker to use a mirror (China-friendly mirror example)
# Edit or create: C:\ProgramData\docker\config\daemon.json
{
  "registry-mirrors": ["https://mirror.ccs.tencentyun.com"]
}
# Then restart Docker Desktop and retry
```

**Option C: Pull manually first, then run compose**
```bash
docker pull mysql:8.0
docker pull nginx:alpine
# Then:
npm run docker:up
```

**Option D: Skip Docker entirely — run locally** (fastest to get started)
```bash
# If you have MySQL running locally (or install it):
npm run db:migrate
npm run db:seed
npm run dev
```

### What I fixed in the Docker config
| Issue | Before | After |
|-------|--------|-------|
| Obsolete `version` key | `version: '3.9'` | Removed |
| Invalid `env_file` path | `../server/.env` (outside compose context) | Removed, use inline `environment` |
| Missing network isolation | No network | `app-network` (bridge) |

The Dockerfiles and compose file are syntactically correct now. The pull failure is purely a network issue to Docker Hub's registry.

**Affected Files:**
- `C:\Users\chrom\Desktop\Coding\WebDev\PoemQuizzer\server\src\routes\quiz.ts`

**Output:**

*Diff for `quiz.ts`:*
```diff
import { Router, Request, Response } from 'express';
import { body, validationResult } from 'express-validator';
import { Prisma, EventPhase as PrismaEventPhase } from '@prisma/client';
import { prisma } from '../index';
import { authenticate } from '../middleware/auth';
import { validateTiming } from '../middleware/timing-validator';
import { requirePhase, EventPhase } from '../middleware/event-phase';
import { matchKeywords } from '../utils/keyword-matcher';
import { sanitizeAnswer } from '../utils/sanitization';

const router = Router();

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GET /api/quiz/status
// Get current event phase and quiz availability (public)
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.get('/status', async (_req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GET /api/quiz/leaderboard?phase=PRE_QUALIFIER|FINALS
// Get leaderboard (public, top scores)
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.get('/leaderboard', async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const preQualifierEnd = new Date(
      process.env.PRE_QUALIFIER_END_DATE || '2026-04-20T23:59:59Z'
    );
    const finalsStart = new Date(
      process.env.FINALS_START_DATE || '2026-04-24T16:45:00Z'
    );
    const finalsEnd = new Date(
      process.env.FINALS_END_DATE || '2026-04-24T18:45:00Z'
    );

    res.json({
      phases: {
        preQualifier: {
          active: new Date() < preQualifierEnd,
          endDate: preQualifierEnd.toISOString(),
        },
        finals: {
          active: new Date() >= finalsStart && new Date() <= finalsEnd,
          startDate: finalsStart.toISOString(),
          endDate: finalsEnd.toISOString(),
        },
      },
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Quiz status error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch quiz status' });
  }
});

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GET /api/quiz/questions?phase=PRE_QUALIFIER|FINALS
// Get all questions for a phase (without correct answers)
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.get(
  '/questions',
  requirePhase(EventPhase.PRE_QUALIFIER, EventPhase.FINALS),
  async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
    try {
      const { phase } = req.query;

      if (
        phase !== EventPhase.PRE_QUALIFIER &&
        phase !== EventPhase.FINALS
      ) {
        res.status(400).json({
          error: 'Invalid phase. Use PRE_QUALIFIER or FINALS',
        });
        return;
      }

      const questions = await prisma.question.findMany({
        where: {
          phase: phase as unknown as PrismaEventPhase,
          isActive: true,
        },
        select: {
          id: true,
          type: true,
          questionText: true,
          imageUrl: true,
          options: true,
          timeLimit: true,
          order: true,
        },
        orderBy: { order: 'asc' },
      });

      // Check which questions the user has already answered
      const submissions = await prisma.submission.findMany({
        where: {
          userId: req.userId,
          question: { phase: phase as unknown as PrismaEventPhase },
        },
        select: { questionId: true },
      });

      const answeredIds = new Set(submissions.map((s) => s.questionId));

      res.json({
        phase,
        questions: questions.map((q) => ({
          ...q,
          answered: answeredIds.has(q.id),
        })),
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Get questions error:', error);
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch questions' });
    }
  }
);

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GET /api/quiz/question/:id
// Get a single question (for quiz flow)
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.get(
  '/question/:id',
  requirePhase(EventPhase.PRE_QUALIFIER, EventPhase.FINALS),
  async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
    try {
      const { id } = req.params as { id: string };

      const question = await prisma.question.findFirst({
        where: {
          id,
          isActive: true,
        },
        select: {
          id: true,
          type: true,
          phase: true,
          questionText: true,
          imageUrl: true,
          options: true,
          timeLimit: true,
          order: true,
        },
      });

      if (!question) {
        res.status(404).json({ error: 'Question not found' });
        return;
      }

      // Check if already answered
      const existingSubmission = await prisma.submission.findUnique({
        where: {
          userId_questionId: {
            userId: req.userId!,
            questionId: id,
          },
        },
      });

      res.json({
        question,
        alreadyAnswered: !!existingSubmission,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Get question error:', error);
      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch question' });
    }
  }
);

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// POST /api/quiz/submit
// Submit an answer to a question (server-side scoring)
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.post(
  '/submit',
  requirePhase(EventPhase.PRE_QUALIFIER, EventPhase.FINALS),
  validateTiming,
  [
    body('questionId').isUUID().withMessage('Valid question ID is required'),
    body('answer').notEmpty().withMessage('Answer is required'),
  ],
  async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
    try {
      const errors = validationResult(req);
      if (!errors.isEmpty()) {
        res.status(400).json({ errors: errors.array() });
        return;
      }

      const { questionId, answer, timeTaken } = req.body;
      const userId = req.userId!;

      // Check if already answered
      const existingSubmission = await prisma.submission.findUnique({
        where: {
          userId_questionId: {
            userId,
            questionId,
          },
        },
      });

      if (existingSubmission) {
        res.status(409).json({
          error: 'Question already answered',
          submission: {
            isCorrect: existingSubmission.isCorrect,
          },
        });
        return;
      }

      // Fetch the question with correct answer data
      const question = await prisma.question.findUnique({
        where: { id: questionId },
      });

      if (!question || !question.isActive) {
        res.status(404).json({ error: 'Question not found' });
        return;
      }

      // Sanitize the answer
      const sanitizedAnswer = sanitizeAnswer(answer);

      // Server-side scoring logic
      let isCorrect = false;

      switch (question.type) {
        case 'MULTIPLE_CHOICE':
        case 'TRUE_FALSE': {
          // Exact match (case-insensitive)
          const correctAnswer = (
            question.correctAnswer as string
          ).toLowerCase();
          isCorrect = sanitizedAnswer.toLowerCase() === correctAnswer;
          break;
        }

        case 'SHORT_ANSWER': {
          // Keyword matching
          const keywords = question.keywords as string[] | null;
          if (keywords && keywords.length > 0) {
            const matchResult = matchKeywords(sanitizedAnswer, keywords);
            isCorrect = matchResult.isCorrect;
          } else {
            // Fallback to exact match if no keywords
            isCorrect =
              sanitizedAnswer.toLowerCase() ===
              (question.correctAnswer as string).toLowerCase();
          }
          break;
        }

        default:
          res.status(400).json({ error: 'Unknown question type' });
          return;
      }

      // Record the submission
      const submission = await prisma.submission.create({
        data: {
          userId,
          questionId,
          userAnswer: sanitizedAnswer,
          isCorrect,
          timeTaken: parseInt(timeTaken, 10),
        },
      });

      // Update the user's score
      const points = isCorrect ? question.points : 0;

      // Upsert score record for this phase
      await prisma.score.upsert({
        where: {
          userId_phase: {
            userId,
            phase: question.phase,
          },
        },
        update: {
          totalScore: { increment: points },
          correctAnswers: { increment: isCorrect ? 1 : 0 },
          totalQuestions: { increment: 1 },
        },
        create: {
          userId,
          phase: question.phase,
          totalScore: points,
          correctAnswers: isCorrect ? 1 : 0,
          totalQuestions: 1,
        },
      });

      // Build response (reveal correct answer for feedback)
      let correctAnswerDisplay = question.correctAnswer as string;
      if (question.type === 'SHORT_ANSWER' && question.keywords) {
        correctAnswerDisplay = (question.keywords as string[]).join(' / ');
      }

      res.json({
        submission: {
          id: submission.id,
          isCorrect,
          userAnswer: sanitizedAnswer,
        },
        correctAnswer: correctAnswerDisplay,
        points: isCorrect ? question.points : 0,
        explanation: question.explanation || null,
      });
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Submit answer error:', error);

      // Handle Prisma unique constraint error
      if (
        error instanceof Prisma.PrismaClientKnownRequestError &&
        error.code === 'P2002'
      ) {
        res.status(409).json({ error: 'Question already answered' });
        return;
      }

      res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to submit answer' });
    }
  }
);

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GET /api/quiz/score?phase=PRE_QUALIFIER|FINALS
// Get current score for a phase
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.get('/score', async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const { phase } = req.query;

    if (
      phase !== EventPhase.PRE_QUALIFIER &&
      phase !== EventPhase.FINALS
    ) {
      res.status(400).json({
        error: 'Invalid phase. Use PRE_QUALIFIER or FINALS',
      });
      return;
    }

    const score = await prisma.score.findUnique({
      where: {
        userId_phase: {
          userId: req.userId!,
          phase: phase as unknown as PrismaEventPhase,
        },
      },
    });

    // Get total questions for this phase
    const totalQuestions = await prisma.question.count({
      where: {
        phase: phase as unknown as PrismaEventPhase,
        isActive: true,
      },
    });

    res.json({
      score: score
        ? {
            totalScore: score.totalScore,
            correctAnswers: score.correctAnswers,
            totalQuestions: score.totalQuestions,
            timeCompleted: score.timeCompleted,
          }
        : {
            totalScore: 0,
            correctAnswers: 0,
            totalQuestions: 0,
            timeCompleted: null,
          },
      totalAvailable: totalQuestions,
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Get score error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch score' });
  }
});

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
// GET /api/quiz/leaderboard?phase=PRE_QUALIFIER|FINALS
// Get leaderboard (public, top scores)
// ──────────────────────────────────────────────
router.get('/leaderboard', async (req: Request, res: Response): Promise<void> => {
  try {
    const { phase } = req.query;
    const limit = Math.min(
      parseInt((req.query.limit as string) || '50', 10),
      100
    );

    const phaseFilter =
      phase === EventPhase.FINALS
        ? EventPhase.FINALS
        : EventPhase.PRE_QUALIFIER;

    const scores = await prisma.score.findMany({
      where: {
        phase: phaseFilter as unknown as PrismaEventPhase,
        totalQuestions: { gt: 0 },
      },
      select: {
        totalScore: true,
        correctAnswers: true,
        totalQuestions: true,
        timeCompleted: true,
        user: {
          select: {
            fullName: true,
            faculty: true,
            department: true,
            studentId: true,
          },
        },
      },
      orderBy: [
        { totalScore: 'desc' },
        { timeCompleted: 'asc' },
      ],
      take: limit,
    });

    res.json({
      phase: phaseFilter,
      leaderboard: scores.map((s, index) => ({
        rank: index + 1,
        fullName: s.user.fullName || 'Anonymous',
        faculty: s.user.faculty,
        department: s.user.department,
        studentId: s.user.studentId,
        totalScore: s.totalScore,
        correctAnswers: s.correctAnswers,
        totalQuestions: s.totalQuestions,
        timeCompleted: s.timeCompleted,
      })),
    });
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Leaderboard error:', error);
    res.status(500).json({ error: 'Failed to fetch leaderboard' });
  }
});

export default router;

```
